**Politicians Are Like Diapers... 🧷**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9a9ed6c1e90748e0a492eb0c99ac0e9e&_e=iYR8eTEpiI__aH7fQRt0y6Aw8yu11J9RHjnyRY19Dn18BA2Mg5LDVYbAl6efIYC-FnqHFxiKk_cNYp3PUGXGkw1CEkG4gtJJ1XXTkGCYOZ4foSqcr8fznPykvS9QRvfPl4RElfQF_GPLd-60267qNihOHhqllUtdeVaU-eOHzoo9ez5G-TLnMoAsLxSsS8TKpMaNIl-HmDPLCPcE_pvj1gHP3fgd3EBbJ0ZfOXYmPjHdLgjyb5AdbVBL-iIpzDoTa_EbByVQ77W4svnN6WDrKV7zXVw_DQTic1oSbEyG5-kCeCRyZ9b5VEgV6NnXMDGrjofuPbSea2F587D6hrYjQ0fA4Z0pE3RPHlwgInuWlxCuQfgFJICmqqz-hJhmNuCaPG2KP0erxYBDhZ7cPYkUf67FRaJUOnqZF19Kalwuo4g%3D)
Mark Twain said it best: “Politicians are like diapers, they need to be changed often, and for the same reasons.”

Think about it. Nancy Pelsoi has been in Congress for 34 years. But that’s nothing compared to some of the longest serving members. Senator Patrick Leahy from Vermont (who is finally retiring) has been in Congress almost 47 years. Senator Ed Markey from Massachusetts is nipping at his heels with 45 years. The all-time record holder is former Rep. John Dingell from Michigan who served a whopping 59 years and 21 days in Congress.

The problem with career politicians is that Washington changes people. Sure, they make promises on the campaign trail about accountability and transparency, but after a few decades, politicians forget where they came from and care more about climbing the DC ranks than standing by principle or helping the people back home.

Most people agree that Washington is broken. Well, how can we expect to change anything if the same people are sitting in Congress for decades upon decades?

That’s why I recently introduced [congressional term limits legislation](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9a9ed6c1e90748e0a492eb0c99ac0e9e&_e=iYR8eTEpiI__aH7fQRt0y5u_GNPB2wuuuZTTXnnE5QxZ2aAOhe7MfJU09LRgi8FRUeSCNGwDqLsEhk_IdyriwjGNXp8O9rXvQFI4jsWJVVpZ1mnJwDDSuk_Jbu8xmxVHsPGzvcHhkLZLflCswUHNEf5NY9EFXZ6jWAkx02DEbxq_Tyqou2ULNvKK0gKnNUc8t-GiY62wzUi10C5ptzJf44jJbwwfxjfFH7GIuDYHelspeL8GmQp9_NZHGij-p2Cth5KC0jKm8Xv1d3Zy_gtHP_LB9Pm7nfo6gEz-AegkrAzIGw_xwoFIVFk0XOVgynRaAJlTGxSvcmHzoGbdxm8PP2-rT63KQGKYkMkWm0G5AOzy5__TjRdCZyNwkPJ_eBgLJeUdlzVGN6YnRfzM8zsMetGUtRbscaiYK8OKp2uigefXFleFq0xiIhJisXek8U-jktfuVYx4VBxPH3MGfYEj3w%3D%3D). The [bill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9a9ed6c1e90748e0a492eb0c99ac0e9e&_e=iYR8eTEpiI__aH7fQRt0y16-q7r8AXbwr_C1NBaC-Qm89Q1_FCzhEYRuS9oxrLtE5lsx6CP2JSCrukqiPUzQra-qgKTm09n2J19E57wNtgh1E3Ym9I8Sg7eLqMy8qSucaXC4xanfzzZdW9OWoPuZqyaPt_gBqhY7b7Pxw8HVVTuSKjfJTdIdObCZsXm6gUl543Pa8EGHXiNkUcPLPKuw6iNL8JLW36GodU75OGZ2v6aSiupR_2uPJBAXldvoVo-BYrKbgAA4mt0IVsJtMeBcgAKrsiFmF5RjpbGTkuEw6N-dn2GAXdzsfQ_VGrFq8tVy9rBIyngI77qeQ3n3WIipzCB7DWhsrPezBJ3chyYzlQ_QMISGx4GIJkM6RhIK9Yu_) is all of two pages and would limit representatives to three two-year terms and senators to two six-year terms.

It should come as no surprise that most politicians hate the idea of term limits. That’s like asking a turkey to endorse Thanksgiving. But the American people love it. [Eighty percent](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9a9ed6c1e90748e0a492eb0c99ac0e9e&_e=iYR8eTEpiI__aH7fQRt0y7fS8DmRz7JeElFA8PqKOhs7TG6A_WIHjz2KgBfRDdSJ7WT2j5wlkTs3qtAekY3cVxKsrDp5eWA1FiNFs0DhhxKnsXtd0aBpELjM08txQlsVt0IFL_lnyKye2v8LQ93ndXuTT6-65Bo1PSUkzjt_REtfWwuIgWiEn9goDGPb1YmeUqk_5zI5vwWoBeOwcwJceqGxW5xxIb1DnRe36NHCHtw103XSqv4vqnFWA4pihLdGwDvTQEDd1TW-TM5iD1SdGDzu1M9fHtWlirONUQMM23TxWcfkRUOhvDKxLkGMxgby) of American voters support term limits for congressional members. As Harry Truman put it, “Term limits would cure senility and seniority—both terrible legislative diseases.” Amen, brother.

Knox County Schools graduated 10 new school security officers this week, and they deserve to be celebrated. There are few roles more important than those who protect our kids.

These [10 new graduates](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=9a9ed6c1e90748e0a492eb0c99ac0e9e&_e=iYR8eTEpiI__aH7fQRt0y7OJctPZ5aHZRz36Rgw6Zs1Uwxnq00Mtqj2cd6TQ_MmAvL-WL6oaow-h4ieTiCo6Q5WXoFlHhwhSOJnn35DMQeSKyT1I28sc1tyeVTrJ2qX7hcOXrLZ7_7jpODv0m57qUrCvLsAr3BMDhbwii5psGRaWZmTo4R3tgZL5oI8dnIh_wHCC8LAHJF62M6IBqoZ62HbqBpEuMCJD7-zdF5bC19dZvDJHZlk2wczizqykbPQoR8u-MZnVwpsrlSBYq2eJsz5rJi_IoAc0nmn_9jsPILOrhP1xReCPSXqispkYR1BJEafkaE02kyrGB-5l_WSqK294_sKw3zsIORmqJrSy29jiqpp63xHW9vLAsVUBnMSI1l33KjzoBnaUZ8kCwOeN5MXWEH3qUqB4GuG7_QZe25w%3D) gave their “Oath of Honor” at the ceremony, vowing to keep our children safe while they are in the classroom. Please join me in congratulating these graduates and praying for their safety as they begin their honorable roles.

clean_body: Are You? | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Fellow Conservative, I had the opportunity to spend some time with President Trump at Mar‐a‐Lago recently. He had a lot to say. But most importantly, he wanted me to relay the message that he is READY to win the 2022 elections. | As the Trump‐endorsed candidate in the North Carolina Senate race, I am so grateful to have his full support. He knows that it is up to me to make sure that we take back the Senate in 2022. I am working hard, but I can always use your support. I want to be able to report back to him that I have the support of America-First patriots like you. He understands that it is not yet an election year, but he knows that RIGHT NOW is when the real work begins. We can save America, but the work has to start now! The fact that Cook Political Report has been steadily downgrading this race from “Likely Democrat” to “Toss Up” means that they’re seeing trends that suggest _this team has a LOT more work to do if we’re going to defend Steve’s seat._
**Trump is already promising to come to Nevada and build out a massive field program \-- and this new rating is only going to add fuel to the fire.**
If Nevada flips red, we’re at risk of losing all of the progress Governor Sisolak made on fighting climate change, protecting workers, expanding voting rights, defending reproductive health, and so much more.

clean_body: | | | | | Team -- this is serious: One of the most accurate political reports in the country just rated Steve’s race as a “Toss Up”. | | | Steve is losing his advantage in this race for battleground Nevada and his 6 Republican opponents aren’t far behind. | | | | | | | | | | | | The fact that Cook Political Report has been steadily downgrading this race from “Likely Democrat” to “Toss Up” means that they’re seeing trends that suggest this team has a LOT more work to do if we’re going to defend Steve’s seat. Trump is already promising to come to Nevada and build out a massive field program \-- and this new rating is only going to add fuel to the fire. If Nevada flips red, we’re at risk of losing all of the progress Governor Sisolak made on fighting climate change, protecting workers, expanding voting rights, defending reproductive health, and so much more. We’re doing everything we can to make sure we don’t let Nevada fall to MAGA Republicans, but we’re counting on you to help out. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing up for Steve, Sisolak HQ | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. | | From the beginning, Dr. Scott Jensen said he wanted this campaign to be authentically Minnesotan: a campaign by Minnesotans, for Minnesotans, listening to the needs of Minnesotans.

One thing is clear: we're all TIRED of the status quo. Dr. Jensen has not been afraid to take on the status quo in both parties. If you're ready to shake up St. Paul and business is usual, Scott's your guy.

If you're ready for that kind of candidate - the kind that can WIN in Minnesota - here's what we ask: help amplify our message on social media.
* [SHARE](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=f662ef2668&e=33b11688c1) Dr. Jensen's content to your personal Facebook account and Facebook groups.

We're in this fight with you, the fight to take back our state and HEAL Minnesota from the failed policies of Tim Walz. Onward!

-Angela, Campaign Manager

Friend,

We are in a fight for the future of our Nation and I need to know if I can count on you.

I just checked the updated list of Patriots on our **Official 2021 Trump Honor Roll** and noticed that your name is still **MISSING.**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: This Might Be It
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58919219:6rqufNErN:m:1:3103520637:E077C130337BF5BF57B0D4359ECC9176:r "Headline") Peter, The Washington Post ran the opinion piece below in February of this year, and it looks like someone in Georgia was paying attention. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58919219:6rqufNErN:m:1:3103520637:E077C130337BF5BF57B0D4359ECC9176:r "Headline")Legislators in Georgia - REPUBLICAN legislators no less - the same ones that refused to audit the election--have finished the process of re-drawing the Congressional seats and have added a massive amount of Democrat voters to my new district. They are hoping to get me out of Congress. **They can't beat me, so they are gerrymandering me out of Congress.** They have been planning this all along because I am standing up for you, not for them. _They hate me for it, and they 're never going to stop._ **[And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I've asked for your help before, and I'm thankful that you've stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58919220:6rqufNErN:m:1:3103520637:E077C130337BF5BF57B0D4359ECC9176:r "And, I hate to admit it, but this time their plan may work unless
loyal supporters like you help me raise enough campaign funds to scare them off before the end of this year. I know I’ve asked for your help
before, and I’m thankful that you’ve stepped up, but I truly need your support of just $25, $50, or $100 before the end of the year.")** This redistricting was a fool's errand that was led by power-obsessed state legislators. These are Republicans, but they aren't MY kind of Republicans - they are the Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger type of Republicans. I know that Joe Biden's inflation is hurting your family, and everything from filling up your gas tank to filling up the grocery cart is more demanding these days. Still, I need you to do all you can to help me fight back against the RINOs and radical leftists who are helping Biden force socialism upon this great nation. **[_If you supported me before,_ I need you to dig even deeper and do all you can to help me. _If you haven 't stood with me before,_ I need you ](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58919219:6rqufNErN:m:1:3103520637:E077C130337BF5BF57B0D4359ECC9176:r "If you supported me before, I need you to dig
even deeper and do all you can to help me. If you haven’t stood with me before, I need you to step up and help me continue the fight for
freedom in the Halls of Congress while Nancy looks for the next way to punish me.")**
---

name: Olivia
subject: shocked and disappointed, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey Patriot,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58932862:JgygzNEeN:m:1:3299561967:FFCD59C55F298BC371AA96BE4E93EF6F:r)
Please choose one of the following options:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58932862:JgygzNEeN:m:1:3299561967:FFCD59C55F298BC371AA96BE4E93EF6F:r) | **[YES: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58932862:JgygzNEeN:m:1:3299561967:FFCD59C55F298BC371AA96BE4E93EF6F:r)** **[NO: I STAND WITH THE DEMOCRATS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58932862:JgygzNEeN:m:1:3299561967:FFCD59C55F298BC371AA96BE4E93EF6F:r)**
---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58932862:JgygzNEeN:m:1:3299561967:FFCD59C55F298BC371AA96BE4E93EF6F:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia
_Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise)_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5otm2kdcc3b31c180tm0h92gdt40k5h2p66di30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udj61otj6dg77cpkssorat9mc2q31dlmmpie4c3nc9h66db665gj1cb4m5j64s37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slgcpoj9cr46up78phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or6c3hm8pb3c5h649fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6pprr3018rr3a8f9mh74tb2qn3dvluqku1c56o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoj2rguh5cd27h8ng7b51khm2kk4s9gnlpfcpr00_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdd2pelbr5fa5sg4e6lt44885hgd0siijvi9cpqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm09bbrcmfgi1v3o5assna9m2fss560c5j91tvk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zop1kpdi3kbsk3u70c2hs41clbd91f55ngd1uh80_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmlea62ce33q9ivllf2q4u7dpodig2vfmdpf51f0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6aor1c9h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:
See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5bor3ua9tqpkq636pt3svmmmu4mqukds9t90tq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6eob0cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr2eco6bdbnmdg76d5kc4pb9o3m6dij1o34e1gbfd9j6dircdticupn2opgshrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl6dg7cpr66ljj6or7m2qmash5u)

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zetas7r9hot2ve2qo84e3n4actfphh1mhu4jnj30_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6eob0cdh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuu20o3g8vjfanfjmsdvbafofmj1jd2dbg3jdpq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdi6eob0cdh2bs)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)
_Sponsored message_

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z76elfj269o6mlgjt5vsnjd0sk7ukm68sl2tqgu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o74cth2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znp7lncr25g3uvmgs40pln366jd7h8rr979g4ltg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o74cth2bs)**
---

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztvekt1584ej6569nbb7u0qo5l8u2umkrcuhi8t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpme5jjct74m1i7ccrje9hmap9he9i6bcpmm4om3dhim9h6fdjm6eq6ec74mljjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30tpl6djr5cj66pgb6o37m2qmash5u)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbjtvjacj3lhl3g0n3uha9n74pr5ln9ume8m3dhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqfkk821e1cn0045ni7jponu66r7qjn23qn7st6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6g9q0a033bh2lk0n1vb03v88t117h119ff18hc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt9mr4ig3q5mnpa9s2v4po0navfa42ph21jl3lno_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq8nu9h97lpqmneu0phr5c6hu16s35vnpr6gmbgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2170tadgog5pla8kltuq4pkiajthj8u626b3o2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znh52u4bslffdkplapc5vo8gtr0tengjmpnsm80g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5dnnb9rnv7j81nuo8hkj6fivnh5bsgv2advsnkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn4ksgm7oo35a4lnc145f645j7jolcr3tkmcmabo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zngs348j2os2gq0eosrkufa3aa8fmftj12outc50_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc54tneecbo29k5lvj7nbbdg2hqq41oc05bnvlm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh64o72c1h2bs) **
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zkfsgiq6pas60gud527op6o85poblmncqqh9f0o8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfaikit121mrkhbnsu7cju16ofc9dic9ocd9hm9g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c3hm4oj0s9g649fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)
_Sponsored message_

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs15mf79ahapa65m3et2hjmdsfqucd3hjevi5bq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh6apb4cph2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zortu0r44ce866ihmro6mni4l4qkobndlrkosto8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdh6apb4cph2bs)**
---

name: American Update
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8114%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=pNteYKFZvXWN7POPwZk1Pw&sysid=1)
Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19849%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nhYQ3s6TNtpkUn3rY8LTUQ&sysid=1)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19840%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5axxJ5hYkMdZdnyL6J9Lrg&sysid=1)**

Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?300um--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

&nbs; p;

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdq-4qqlpo4/)

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, you’re one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdr-4qqlpo5/)

245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That’s why we’re asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi’s socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrds-4qqlpo6/)

Patriot, Donald Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress _OR_[**you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to join an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdt-4qqlpo7/)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdu-4qqlpo8/)

America’s Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you’ve got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdv-4qqlpo9/)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. There are millions of other Trump Patriots who would happily join the 1776 Donor Club. We chose YOU! [**Answer the call**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdw-4qqlpo0/) or we will have to select the next conservative on our list...

___________________________________________
**
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdx-4qqlpo1/)

ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. [**Can we count on you to step up?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdy-4qqlpo2/)

[**DONATE**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-300um-1nrdz-4qqlpo3/)

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.****
****
****

name: Letitia James
subject: How we defeat Omicron:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329042/319361116/324296880?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIYrkE1_Dp2mXvOE7bNYBTv-kiY9LM3yyFFaDZYxlEY=)
---
I’m sure you’ve heard the news, Peter.

New York officials confirmed that there are cases of the COVID-19 Omicron Variant in the New York City metropolitan area. And these are not just from people traveling overseas – there was community spread.

I _know_ how exhausting and cyclical the battle against COVID can feel. I _know_ that you’re tired of being told to wear a mask and stay vigilant.
**But please, Peter, we need to continue to do our part to protect ourselves and others from the Omicron Variant. New York cannot heal unless all ****of us do our part. That’s why I've called for a statewide mask mandate so we can defeat COVID once and for all.**

We need everyone – from those who live in the New York City metro area to those who live in our smallest towns upstate – to do their part to combat COVID. That means wearing a mask, getting a vaccine if you haven’t already, and getting a booster if you are eligible.
**[For information on where and how to get a vaccine, including a booster, click here. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329043/319361117/2022325417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIYrkE1_Dp2mXvOE7bNYBTv-kiY9LM3yyFFaDZYxlEY=&emci=21e363b5-6854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=94eac45c-0f55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)**
We cannot defeat COVID-19 without kindness and compassion for both ourselves _and_ our neighbors. Let’s show the world what New York can do when we work together.

Letitia James
| | In order to protect the most vulnerable from the threats of the COVID-19 Omicron Variant, I’ve called for a statewide mask mandate. Will you join me in this fight to keep all New Yorkers safe from COVID-19 and add your name to join me?
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329044/319361118/945273322?code=jtk245-fr-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ftj4ny-1121-priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIYrkE1_Dp2mXvOE7bNYBTv-kiY9LM3yyFFaDZYxlEY=&emci=21e363b5-6854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=94eac45c-0f55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369504)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: your support:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you from my home in Cedar Rapids. I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and are gearing up for a great holiday season. I'm reaching out to you personally today to ask that you make your very first contribution by donating $5. I promise it will make a meaningful impact in our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain.
Right now, polling from the Des Moines Register shows Sen. Grassley is at his highest disapproval with Iowa voters in nearly two decades. He's vulnerable, and Republicans know that he's on thin ice. It's probably why the Senate Republican campaign arm has been actively attacking me, and they have nearly $30 million in the bank to go on attacking me and protecting their Trump-endorsed incumbent. I want you to hear this from me: I have every intention of winning this race, but I cannot do it without an unprecedented movement made up of people like you donating $5, $10, or $20 at a time. Your hard-earned dollars build up this movement.
Nearly $30 million in Republican money is a lot to compete with. The full backing of Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump is a lot to compete with. But we _can_ compete and win if we build up the strongest grassroots movement possible! That's why, ahead of our last public FEC reporting deadline of the year, it's so important that you make your first contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare to defeat Sen. Grassley. The best link to donate is right here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329049/319361152/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk446-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwYvUq-GKtx2cE3whL1MXAlL0T_aIF2Zr6Yy_YWjdlo=)**
I am not someone who backs down from a challenge, and I've gone up against people like Sen. Grassley before: I won an election against a man double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. Still, as a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out.
The pundits and so-called experts will say what they want to say, but at the end of the day, I know that with lots of hard work and unwavering grassroots support, we will flip this Senate seat blue.
This is personal. Right now, working families in communities across Iowa are being failed by a senator who has left them behind. Those families are _my_ family. Dad was a union pipefitter-welder, and Mom worked for the Dubuque public school system. They inspired me to show up for my community, which is exactly why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley. It's time to lift up the voices of Iowa's working families in the Senate.
Peter, I appreciate you sticking with me as I write about what this race means to me. I'm going to bring this email to a close. But before I do, I've got to press the importance of building up a grassroots movement again. When you chip in $5, along with hundreds of other people, it adds up to something powerful. It adds up to a campaign that can compete and win. So please, will you make your first donation to help me win in Iowa and defeat Sen. Grassley? Here's that link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329050/319361153/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk446-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwYvUq-GKtx2cE3whL1MXAlL0T_aIF2Zr6Yy_YWjdlo=)**
With so much gratitude,

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39329051/319361154/496662621?refcode=jtk446-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwYvUq-GKtx2cE3whL1MXAlL0T_aIF2Zr6Yy_YWjdlo=&emci=e80ec4ba-dc51-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=95eac45c-0f55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13784334#!).
To unsubscribe from this email list, please click [here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e80ec4ba-dc51-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/95eac45c-0f55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWVhYzQ1Yy0wZjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwYvUq-GKtx2cE3whL1MXAlL0T_aIF2Zr6Yy_YWjdlo=&id=117985518). body:
Florida is home to the world’s largest network of freshwater springs. Pollution, overuse, agricultural runoff, and sewage are threatening our waterways. Ken’s number one priority is cleaning up and protecting our unique ecosystems. body:

Derek — I wanted to take a quick moment to say thank you for being a part of this campaign. Since we launched in August, every dollar sent to this campaign by good folks like you helps make sure my team has what they need to run a competitive campaign. **Holding onto this district — and Democrats holding the House — is so important. Not for me,_for us_.** We deserve a society, a government, and a democracy that works _for us_ — not just for billionaires and big corporations. **And there’s no time to waste in this fight.** We have to step up at this moment with brave, bold action and policies that improve the lives of people in Western PA — that’s what I mean when I say I’m fighting for _our common good._ Thank you, again, for being on our team and for being with us at every leg of this race. Chris ****[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39333342/319379256/-381930006?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211204thankyou_CD_op_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGVlMjdmZC0xNTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lw5L4i44ZGKxtITAKecsM8n_qytRznc6Lq0FGe23O4Q=)**** | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: Chris Farrell on the Weekly Briefing with Christina Bobb this Weekend!
body: Judicial Watch Director of Investigations & Research Chris Farrell will appear on “Weekly Briefing with Christina Bobb” on One America News Network in the 2 pm hour ET, Saturday, December 4th & Sunday, December 5th, to discuss USSS records show Bill Clinton flying with G Maxwell; Joe Biden's decline; the odds of a Kamala Harris presidency; and more! [INSIDE JW] Chris Farrell on the Weekly Briefing with Christina Bobb this Weekend! Check local listings for showtimes in your area. name: Dolan For Ohio
subject: #OhioFirst Week In Review
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc
body:
No images? [Click here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-e-bljiydt-idulfldlt-b/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-r/)
**#OhioFirst Week in Review **
December 3, 2021We hope everyone had a great Thanksgiving Holiday! Matt was back on the campaign trail on Monday. He made a quick stop at Skyline Chili before attending the Ohio Press Network Candidates Forum. Our #OhioFirst team ordered a couple 3-Ways, of course! Matt appeared on _The Brandon Boxer Show_ this week on WTVN in Columbus. Brandon described Matt as "one of those guys who is a commonsense conservative leader." In the interview, Matt and Brandon discussed their mutual admiration for President Ronald Reagan, the need for stronger border security and Matt's #OhioMatters tour that has returned the focus of the Ohio Senate race to issues that impact Ohio. If you missed it, you can listen to the interview [HERE](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-y/).Matt has routinely been the **ONLY **Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio that has pledged to uphold and defend the U.S. Constitution. On Wednesday, the U.S. Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women 's Health_. Their ruling on the case carries the potential to finally overturn Roe v. Wade.The Justices' statements in _Dobbs_ , along with the Biden Administration's [announcement this week](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-j/) that they would surrender their opposition to reimplementation of President Trump's "Remain in Mexico", clearly illustrate the power of nominating and confirming conservative jurists to the federal bench. On this point, Matt said, "Restart of Remain in Mexico and the Dobbs arguments highlight that the Constitution in SACRED and NEVER a matter of convenience. In the U.S. Senate, I will proudly support strict constructionists for the federal bench who vow to uphold the rule of law and protect Life."Last night, Matt attended the Ohio Republican Party Christmas Party in Columbus. He enjoyed speaking with many of his friends and colleagues, including Lt. Governor Jon Husted. Congrats to Ohio Republican Party Chairman Bob Paduchik on a successful event. Lastly, this morning we witnessed [another dismal jobs report ](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-t/)for Joe Biden and Tim Ryan that came in hundreds of thousands of jobs short of what was expected. Matt once again reiterated his opposition to Democrats' "radical Build Back Broke" legislation, making clear that their prescription of tax hikes and big spending will only drive-up debt, inflation and slow our recovery. Matt called for socialist Democrats to ditch their left-wing agenda.That's it for this week's update. You can learn more about Matt's campaign and how to get involved on our team at [www.DolanforOhio.com](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-i/).Have a great weekend, The #OhioFirst Team [Donate Here](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-d/) [](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-h/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-k/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-u/)[](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bljiydt-idulfldlt-o/) | Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc. [Preferences](https://dolanforohioinc.updatemyprofile.com/y-bljiydt-FC066A9E-idulfldlt-m) | [Unsubscribe](https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bljiydt-idulfldlt-c/)
---

name: Team Cammack
subject: Support working families!
body:
The Biden Administration has declared a war on working-class families.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nm4nw7T5Bj1Z2uxc8San_869I669UZ6ePCP4mfBjXvRmSCx9PiApqHlyjScSVKZW8OBAUunCnqK6J-iSFtxI-ZqJlGyFvulvDLA3Xvm7BjkxC52R4y-gf5VY83MY_iuMFPfk1Oytgerpg686Km359Ypr-LVNM3UOZ5sTNxlVYqpup9I7D8qEPC1CbgBDawSvZ6SQC1xTGUI=&c=-NVSeoRqN0DB_LrfmIO31B-cf34xeqqTUxzc1VZ1PrV_p6ZpCn655g==&ch=FtvoBXU2RC2hPY4LRFFeZI2IoH_9I69B5QmeX7QNXnl_QfO-AgpOaQ==)

| Friend,
The Biden Administration has declared a war on working-class families. In their attempt to morph America into a Socialist "utopia," they have decided that working Americans should carry the burden of their massive spending sprees.
Leftist policies will continue to cripple hard-working Americans as long as Biden is not held accountable. We must stand up and show Biden that we stand with working families!
Will you sign our petition showing that you stand with America's working families?
---
| | | [SIGN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Nm4nw7T5Bj1Z2uxc8San_869I669UZ6ePCP4mfBjXvRmSCx9PiApqHlyjScSVKZW8OBAUunCnqK6J-iSFtxI-ZqJlGyFvulvDLA3Xvm7BjkxC52R4y-gf5VY83MY_iuMFPfk1Oytgerpg686Km359Ypr-LVNM3UOZ5sTNxlVYqpup9I7D8qEPC1CbgBDawSvZ6SQC1xTGUI=&c=-NVSeoRqN0DB_LrfmIO31B-cf34xeqqTUxzc1VZ1PrV_p6ZpCn655g==&ch=FtvoBXU2RC2hPY4LRFFeZI2IoH_9I69B5QmeX7QNXnl_QfO-AgpOaQ==)

Of course, Biden isn't worried about any of these things because it doesn't affect him. Liberal elites have been pawning off their disastrous policies on the working class while they live lavishly.
We refuse to stand by and let Biden's attack on our economy continue. We will stand up to these socialist bullies trying to destroy our jobs and communities.
Will you sign our petition showing you stand with working families?

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39333932/319381661/305470631?refcode=fl_email_ta_20211204abrams_wm_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQ3ZDRkZC0xNzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=919JXxxzIUObrU2JMGOIXKwEM9us8LgFvPe3rwHGCqI=)
---
Did you hear the exciting news this week, friend? [**My friend Stacey Abrams is running for Governor of Georgia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39333934/319381662/305470631?refcode=fl_email_ta_20211204abrams_wm_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQ3ZDRkZC0xNzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=919JXxxzIUObrU2JMGOIXKwEM9us8LgFvPe3rwHGCqI=) You may remember when Stacey ran for this same seat in 2018, building an influential and inspiring people-powered campaign centered on defending and expanding the right to vote. Unfortunately, her Republican opponent and then Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp won by only 2 percent after some of the most egregious voter suppression efforts we’ve seen in decades. Stacey is a changemaker. She’s spent her life fighting for Georgians as a representative in the state house and as a passionate voting rights advocate. Now, like me, Stacey is running for governor to ensure every person in her state has the opportunity to thrive. **Maryland and Georgia are going to be two of the top gubernatorial races in the country next year** , and with continued far-right attacks on voting rights, reproductive choice, and working families, we need to win and create transformative change here at the state level. **[Help Stacey and I usher in new leadership for the people of Maryland and Georgia in 2022: split a contribution of $10 or more to directly fuel our grassroots campaigns today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39333937/319381663/305470631?refcode=fl_email_ta_20211204abrams_wm_30da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTQ3ZDRkZC0xNzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=919JXxxzIUObrU2JMGOIXKwEM9us8LgFvPe3rwHGCqI=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Did you hear the exciting news this week, friend? = You may remember when Stacey ran for this same seat in 2018, building an influential and inspiring people-powered campaign centered on defending and expanding the right to vote. Unfortunately, her Republican opponent and then Georgia Secretary of State Brian Kemp won by only 2 percent after some of the most egregious voter suppression efforts we’ve seen in decades. Stacey is a changemaker. She’s spent her life fighting for Georgians as a representative in the state house and as a passionate voting rights advocate. Now, like me, Stacey is running for governor to ensure every person in her state has the opportunity to thrive. Maryland and Georgia are going to be two of the top gubernatorial races in the country next year , and with continued far-right attacks on voting rights, reproductive choice, and working families, we need to win and create transformative change here at the state level. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. name: Dr. Oz
subject: I was heartbroken and disgusted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Biden failed, and left us with so little.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933768:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)
---

Fellow Americans,

_The collapse and carnage that is unfolding abroad and at our border is a true glimpse into the unmitigated disaster of Joe Biden and his administration._

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. _[**Join my campaign to bring back strong leadership to America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933768:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)_

As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform.

While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. _The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come._

On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. _**[Pitch in here to secure our border and put Americans first once again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933768:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)**_

If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. _**[Americans can not endure another catastrophe of this magnitude.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933768:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)**_

**As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us.

Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership.**

I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies.

This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it.

As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST.

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933768:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)
Dr. Oz

* * *
_Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you.**[Donate $25 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58933769:6cFqSNE4N:m:1:3253819041:661E9D19A647BBCCCEDC97A20741EC3F:r)** to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator._
* * *
| Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
---

name: Eric Gash
subject: Update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336559/319387811/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)
Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your continued support for our campaign. With your help, we continue to grow our support locally and prove we have what it takes to win this race for the people of NC-14.

It’s been an eventful few months on the campaign trail. We travelled the entire district East to West, and we met with dozens of community members.

I’m so grateful for the new friends I’ve gathered. The time I've spent listening to your concerns and hopes has been invaluable. It has also reaffirmed my commitment to serving this community. We have our work cut out for us, but I'm convinced that folks in Western North Carolina care more about what unites than divides us.

Take a moment to check out some highlights from the trail, and if you have any questions, email me directly!

All my best,

Eric

| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336560/319387812/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)**
---

* * *

I'd like to extend a big thank you to the **TriCounty Democratic Women** for letting me join their lunch. I've been thinking a lot about our conversation around vocational training and making sure folks are able to "plug into" the rest of the state. I look forward to continuing the conversation!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336561/319387813/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336562/319387814/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)

**I had a blast stopping by Henderson High to rile up the team on game day.** I may be running for Congress, but I will always be "Coach Gash." I had to let these players know how proud I am of their hard work and dedication.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336563/319387815/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)

**Welcome to the district, Watauga!** I loved the energy everyone had for creating bipartisan solutions to help our farmers, students, and our growing cities work together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336564/319387816/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)

**I was grateful to spend an afternoon with members of our Hispanic community.** We discussed the opportunities and challenges of rapid growth -- not only in Buncombe, but the surrounding counties as well.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336565/319387817/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)

**Last week, I had the chance to sit with _ABC 13 WLOS_ to discuss my campaign.** We talked about redistricting, Cawthorn's move, and the issues we still need to tackle -- from protecting our veterans to senior care and affordable housing. **[Watch part of the interview here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336566/319387845/311866143?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=) **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39336567/319387846/1573898945?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZhY2Q5ZS0xYjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2i1t2WcEHGAzTU2-dyDGiCzPV54GD5dV9XMz4mlKL_E=)
Again, I can’t thank you enough for your continued support. Your contributions, your words of encouragement, and the time you spend volunteering means so much to me. I couldn’t do this without you.

Sincerely,

Eric

The time I've spent listening to your concerns and hopes has been invaluable. It has also reaffirmed my commitment to serving this community. We have our work cut out for us, but I'm convinced that folks in Western North Carolina care more about what unites than divides us. body:
If Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer keep the House and Senate in 2022 our country is in grave danger. Here’s what th
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpo12ggk619evc3f21f18t9s9ebd3d3ilt5s783o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8thimljjdd33edp76sbkespbas70sapbaolk6go6ccjkmlieacllcjjj4tb6msrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo7ed9jc1pb6phh6ipm8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdj61or6cphm8o724no)

Friend,

If Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer keep the House and Senate in 2022 our country is in grave danger. Here's what they are planning...

* **Seizing more control of our education system** \- College bailouts, Critical Race Theory, FBI agents monitoring school board meetings.
* Enacting a **job-killing "Green New Deal"** or another AOC fantasy.
* Even worse... Joe Biden may have the opportunity to put a **_radical leftwing judge on the Supreme Court_.**

You and I CANNOT allow Biden to win the 2022 elections.

Which is why I am personally endorsing Mike Gibbons for the U.S. Senate in Ohio. Gibbons is a hardcore constitutional conservative, a FIGHTER, and man of principle. [**Please join me by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even more by clicking here.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z944fo7mldh3m7qu17e02hfjrd0quq4n8r5o2098_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdj6cor4c3h2bs)

**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4202eqtat4k5pfliobiv2ba2pokaum4c8a0tio_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdj6cor4c3h2bs)**

Mike is a father, husband, Christian, America-First patriot, and a businessman.

He is NOT a politician and he's proud of that. Mike started his career pouring concrete, working on a factory floor, and didn't open his own business until he was 37. He is living proof the American dream is achievable and will serve as my TOP ally in the U.S. Senate.

Here is a list of reasons why I am endorsing Mike Gibbons for Senate:

* Mike has agreed to help me FIRE Anthony Fauci
* He is 100% pro-life and 100% pro Second Amendment
* He's declared war on cancel culture and shown he's a fighter that won't be silenced by the radical left
* Mike will DEFUND and ABOLISH Critical Race Theory programs
* Mike believes in an America-First foreign policy and loves our country
* **I believe Mike Gibbons is the most conservative candidate running in 2022 and can WIN. **

_I told Mike I was planning on sending you an email today_.

He told me he is willing to personally MATCH your online donation with his own funds.

That means if you donate $10, Mike will personally donate $10 from his personal funds to the campaign. **That means your donation is DOUBLED!**

[**Please click here or one of the links below to donate and Mike will MATCH your gift:**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8pstb8fkvuosh9kn0mjq5bc81109mvuqa94890_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdj6cor4c3h2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z58medhuip61n91eaafap829kldiajunodourth8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdj6cor4c3h2bs)

Friend, I am counting on you to read this email and take action.

I suspect you love the principles of liberty and our country as much as I do.

Mike Gibbons is one of us.

He's a hardcore constitutional conservative and he's willing to do battle cancel culture, big government, and the radical left.

I have personally committed to do everything I can to elect Mike to the Senate in 2022. It would mean a lot to both me and Mike if you sent a donation to his campaign.

We can't allow Biden to pick Supreme Court Justices, sink our country into deeper debt, or seize control of our education system.

The stakes are high and I'm counting on you.

[**Please help me raise $10,000 for Mike 's campaign. You can donate any amount by clicking here.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zht5309p4frpbv5svl8u3gm1kh63b354aqdh3fgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdj6cor4c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Donna Imam
subject: My district is a pickup opportunity for Democrats.
body:
We have the formula to win this seat and take back Texas in 2022. Now we just need you! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39337346/319389149/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1MmU1NC0xYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsUoJj6qvsAzrsYOahhCiKEkhz8vC6fMyDyUHRvxHOQ=)
It's official, friend.

**Redistricting in Texas is complete and Austin -- for the first time in decades -- got a brand new district.** This is a potential pickup for Democrats in Texas.

**This week, I announced my run for this brand new seat, Texas' 37th Congressional District.** In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $5, $15, or even $35**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39337349/319389150/1898666321?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1MmU1NC0xYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsUoJj6qvsAzrsYOahhCiKEkhz8vC6fMyDyUHRvxHOQ=) to be a Founding Donor to my campaign. But first, let me tell you why I'm running.

I've lived in Austin for over 15 years and built a career in computer engineering at some of Austin's most iconic companies from Motorola/Freescale to Dell. During this time, Austin grew to be the 11th largest city in the country. As an active volunteer in my community, I served as president of a non-profit with 4,000+ members that provides free training and education. We've helped thousands of people, but I realized direct service alone isn't enough. We needed to do more -- and that's why I'm running.

This year we witnessed the GOP restrict voting rights and further gerrymander our state to weaken the voices of Texans -- despite the fact that Hispanic, Black, and Asian Americans accounted for 95% of Texas's population growth in the last decade. We can change this and take back Texas. Here's how:

In 2018, Beto O'Rourke was just short of winning a US Senate seat by 214,921 votes. In 2022 it's up to all candidates to work together and close that gap. We're expanding the electorate by building a coalition of all Texans -- Democrats, independents, and moderates. That's how we win and take back Texas.

In 2020, my campaign got the highest Democratic voter turnout in the history of the district. We went to over 50,000 doors in Williamson County, making it #1 in turnout among the top 25 most populated counties in Texas. That's why we're in the best position to repeat our success in Austin and help Democrats win statewide.

**With our election in just a few months, I need to meet every fundraising mark with strength -- especially since we're going up against the Texas GOP. I need to know you're with me.**

[**Will you chip in $5, $15, or even $35 to be a Founding Donor and help me officially launch our campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39337350/319389151/1898666321?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1MmU1NC0xYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsUoJj6qvsAzrsYOahhCiKEkhz8vC6fMyDyUHRvxHOQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39337351/319389152/1898666321?refcode=em-12.4.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjQ1MmU1NC0xYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsUoJj6qvsAzrsYOahhCiKEkhz8vC6fMyDyUHRvxHOQ=)
