| Unless we make a clear statement that conservatives back America First, the Liz Cheney-types will believe they can go back to the RINO days of yesterday...

subject: Is it time to codify Roe into law?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
We want to hear from you --

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346089/319423182/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZhZWUxZS00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpvZPKjnUdHwoudyoOB5jebeBv5D2l4AOQWu3Ez6AEg=) Like all of you, we at Team Flowers are paying close attention to the arguments being made at the U.S. Supreme Court this week over whether or not to overturn Roe v Wade and gut abortion protections for millions of Americans. **Elizabeth Warren, Amy Klobuchar, and others in Congress have proposed using the Democratic majority to codify Roe into law. ** [**So we want to hear from you. Add your name to our petition if you think Congress should codify Roe vs Wade into law!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346090/319423183/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZhZWUxZS00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpvZPKjnUdHwoudyoOB5jebeBv5D2l4AOQWu3Ez6AEg=&emci=8fa1d5a2-2e55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cb6aee1e-4055-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) | **[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346091/319423184/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZhZWUxZS00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpvZPKjnUdHwoudyoOB5jebeBv5D2l4AOQWu3Ez6AEg=&emci=8fa1d5a2-2e55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cb6aee1e-4055-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035)**
---
It isn’t just Democrats calling on Congress to codify Roe into law. GOP Senator Susan Collins of Maine echoed Warren and Klobuchar in a statement this week: Senator Collins supports the right to an abortion and believes that the protections in the Roe and Casey decisions should be passed into law.
**[For now, we want to know what you think. Should Democrats codify Roe into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346092/319423185/34719616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZhZWUxZS00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpvZPKjnUdHwoudyoOB5jebeBv5D2l4AOQWu3Ez6AEg=&emci=8fa1d5a2-2e55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cb6aee1e-4055-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) **
Thanks for sharing,
Team Flowers for Congress

name: Josh Riley
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Once again, I am overwhelmed with gratitude.

|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346111/319423370/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211204-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2JiZGNmNi00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW0qV5YtOo7vVP_KlEboV4iT6eCkuLUB-4UPWqmatHw=)
---
| Peter,

Once again, I am overwhelmed with gratitude.

**Thanks to your generous support, I just learned that we not only met, but _surpassed_ our November fundraising goal.**

We couldn’t have done it without you, and I am so humbled to see so many folks join this campaign to restore a Square Deal for working families.

Our campaign raised over $200,000 in its first two days — demonstrating that voters want change in NY-22.

And Democratic chairs in Cortland County, Oneida County, Broome County, Madison County, Chenango County, Herkimer County, and Tioga County have issued a joint statement supporting our campaign.

**It has been a great month, but we’re just getting started. It’s going to take a massive effort to unseat Claudia Tenney in 2022. She has already begun doing what career-politicians do: name-calling, division-sowing, and baseless attacks. And we know that she has significant financial resources at her disposal.**

But, Peter, I believe that together, we can create a coalition to flip this seat blue and get back to work at addressing today’s challenges with the urgency they deserve, finding common ground to strengthen the Middle Class and give working families a fair shot.

I am ready to work hard over the next year to deliver real change to New York and our country. Thank you for being with me in this fight.

Sincerely,

Josh Riley

[_**PS. I know we’ve already made a lot of asks of you, but we have to keep our momentum going. Will you ensure we get a head start on our December goal by sending a small contribution today? Every dollar makes a difference →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346112/319423371/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211204-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2JiZGNmNi00MDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oW0qV5YtOo7vVP_KlEboV4iT6eCkuLUB-4UPWqmatHw=)

clean_body: Once again, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. | = | Peter, Once again, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. Thanks to your generous support, I just learned that we not only met, but surpassed our November fundraising goal. We couldn’t have done it without you, and I am so humbled to see so many folks join this campaign to restore a Square Deal for working families. Our campaign raised over $200,000 in its first two days — demonstrating that voters want change in NY-22. And Democratic chairs in Cortland County, Oneida County, Broome County, Madison County, Chenango County, Herkimer County, and Tioga County have issued a joint statement supporting our campaign. It has been a great month, but we’re just getting started. It’s going to take a massive effort to unseat Claudia Tenney in 2022. She has already begun doing what career-politicians do: name-calling, division-sowing, and baseless attacks. And we know that she has significant financial resources at her disposal. But, Peter, I believe that together, we can create a coalition to flip this seat blue and get back to work at addressing today’s challenges with the urgency they deserve, finding common ground to strengthen the Middle Class and give working families a fair shot. I am ready to work hard over the next year to deliver real change to New York and our country. Thank you for being with me in this fight. Sincerely, Josh Riley = | = * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 7160 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760 United States | | ---|--- | = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | Here’s what’s at stake: We don’t save the Post Office, Mitch McConnell will DESTROY Vote by Mail Vote by Mail is destroyed, MILLIONS of Democratic votes will be unaccounted for just like 2020. Millions of votes are suppressed, our majorities will be GONE. We’ll never pass our agenda! So we’ll cut to the chase: | | | | | | The Postal Service is a lifeline for so many communities. Many Americans rely on the USPS to deliver life-saving medicines, food, and ballots! But as you read this email, the Post Office is CRUMBLING. And if the USPS falls apart, so does vote by mail... | | | | | | We need your help, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. name: Brent Bozell
subject: 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935879:67XcQQEvN:m:1:3253819041:D24E1135A00716823EB32DE1BB13E1A4:r)
Peter,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935879:67XcQQEvN:m:1:3253819041:D24E1135A00716823EB32DE1BB13E1A4:r).

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021:

1. **Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate:** Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way.

Disgusting. [**Help the Media Research Center fight Fake News like CNN by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935879:67XcQQEvN:m:1:3253819041:D24E1135A00716823EB32DE1BB13E1A4:r)

2. **Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars:** It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel...

[**Help the Media Research Center expose MSNBC and Fake News Journalists by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935879:67XcQQEvN:m:1:3253819041:D24E1135A00716823EB32DE1BB13E1A4:r)

3. **Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators:** A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education.

Social Security is a sacred trust. It’s a safety net for our seniors.

If we want to make sure this bill passes, we need to show overwhelming support for it.

Brad will always fight to protect Social Security. He knows how important it is to families across the country.

And if he’s elected to Congress, he will support saving this crucial program.

Your support is the fire that fuels this campaign and keeps us going, despite the partisan games they play with our democracy. Republicans in Washington and Columbus are colluding to steal Marcy’s seat and our Democratic majority. They are trying to rig the game in their favor. If anyone can win this district, it is Marcy. The people of Northern Ohio know Marcy has always fought for working families. name: Team Joe Lombardo
subject: Last month of 2021… Let’s finish strong!
body:
This year saw an incredible start for a campaign to keep Nevada safe - Sheriff Joe Lombardo launched his candidacy for Governor and ALREADY leads the field of Republicans!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGyksZCU8oU3bbm-kkcHTiU8w86Ua3P3AcnOB-lCAjQzL03XeGHjTGXEsxMEkOWjlOxGSjQudZGXawJpDeyMzQntSo-ZI9odtX5TaYHP4eP9P_l7tdY_yqj6SwfrhUNQ3oT4_v-f75CW54b9JJ4YkDo10ihgH-EGU_-BEQOPjDhR37A2-7b5FFlDUkhXbfyXaGOlg0LJli0=&c=T-78xbH7J74lBCP-2OgLsP2Tb7EhYHoah6D186y4Ts6B6QON0zkCYA==&ch=uTKvjKkzEB84Tr2mtrmaUKNystNSLYgYGZIkJO-SCRaWsuW6jVIPiA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
This year saw an incredible start for a campaign to keep Nevada safe - Sheriff Joe Lombardo launched his candidacy for Governor and ALREADY leads the field of Republicans!
---
| | | [KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGyksZCU8oU3bbm-kkcHTiU8w86Ua3P3AcnOB-lCAjQzL03XeGHjTGXEsxMEkOWjlOxGSjQudZGXawJpDeyMzQntSo-ZI9odtX5TaYHP4eP9P_l7tdY_yqj6SwfrhUNQ3oT4_v-f75CW54b9JJ4YkDo10ihgH-EGU_-BEQOPjDhR37A2-7b5FFlDUkhXbfyXaGOlg0LJli0=&c=T-78xbH7J74lBCP-2OgLsP2Tb7EhYHoah6D186y4Ts6B6QON0zkCYA==&ch=uTKvjKkzEB84Tr2mtrmaUKNystNSLYgYGZIkJO-SCRaWsuW6jVIPiA==)
---
| Folks from all over the state and country are rallying behind a campaign to STOP Single Party Democrat rule from jeopardizing our safety, controlling our elections, and infringing on our rights.
And that's exactly why we've gotten off to such a hot start - but in order to keep it up, and carry our momentum into a big Election year, [we need to end 2021 on a high note.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGyksZCU8oU3bbm-kkcHTiU8w86Ua3P3AcnOB-lCAjQzL03XeGHjTGXEsxMEkOWjlOxGSjQudZGXawJpDeyMzQntSo-ZI9odtX5TaYHP4eP9P_l7tdY_yqj6SwfrhUNQ3oT4_v-f75CW54b9JJ4YkDo10ihgH-EGU_-BEQOPjDhR37A2-7b5FFlDUkhXbfyXaGOlg0LJli0=&c=T-78xbH7J74lBCP-2OgLsP2Tb7EhYHoah6D186y4Ts6B6QON0zkCYA==&ch=uTKvjKkzEB84Tr2mtrmaUKNystNSLYgYGZIkJO-SCRaWsuW6jVIPiA==)
So will you help us finish the year strong? We can't slow down until we stop Steve Sisolak and his lawless, upside-down policies, and elect Sheriff Joe Lombardo to keep Nevada safe!
---
| | | [FINISH THE YEAR STRONG](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGyksZCU8oU3bbm-kkcHTiU8w86Ua3P3AcnOB-lCAjQzL03XeGHjTGXEsxMEkOWjlOxGSjQudZGXawJpDeyMzQntSo-ZI9odtX5TaYHP4eP9P_l7tdY_yqj6SwfrhUNQ3oT4_v-f75CW54b9JJ4YkDo10ihgH-EGU_-BEQOPjDhR37A2-7b5FFlDUkhXbfyXaGOlg0LJli0=&c=T-78xbH7J74lBCP-2OgLsP2Tb7EhYHoah6D186y4Ts6B6QON0zkCYA==&ch=uTKvjKkzEB84Tr2mtrmaUKNystNSLYgYGZIkJO-SCRaWsuW6jVIPiA==)
---
| 2021 has been a big year for us... But with your continued support, 2022 is going to be even better!
Thank you for keeping up the fight, Team Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGyksZCU8oU3bbm-kkcHTiU8w86Ua3P3AcnOB-lCAjQzL03XeGHjTAg0zYi8OEJLtxyufBTXvvfO9xjgrSNOqdo-1Zdw18DCbGe2sZRB5KlkadEDvuA4x9qQPLolODX4hupCV_Amq5I9fA9hjBEDgg==&c=T-78xbH7J74lBCP-2OgLsP2Tb7EhYHoah6D186y4Ts6B6QON0zkCYA==&ch=uTKvjKkzEB84Tr2mtrmaUKNystNSLYgYGZIkJO-SCRaWsuW6jVIPiA==)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: a young boy from Youngstown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ][IMG]

Do you see this young boy, folks?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Photo of young Tim at bat

This boy was raised by a single mom who worked clerical jobs to put food
on the table. Growing up outside Youngstown, he watched his family lose
their livelihoods as steel mills shut down and jobs got shipped overseas.
He learned the value of hard work from an early age and never forgot where
he came from.

That boy was me, folks. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to
make sure families like mine are taken care of and that all workers get
the dignity and respect they deserve.

I know what’s at stake in this election. We have a once-in-a-generation
opportunity to tilt the balance of power back to working families -- and
I’m damn sure none of my millionaire Republican opponents with their
vacation homes and private yachts will get us there.

CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip in 2022 -- but to win
this race and make history, we need your help to overcome everything the
other side will throw at us.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6238?t=1007&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Will you make a donation of anything you can afford to help us flip
Ohio blue? Our campaign is powered by folks like you, and even $3 makes a
huge difference.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1010&amount=3&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate $3
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1011&amount=50&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1012&amount=100&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1013&amount=200&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1014&amount=250&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6242?t=1015&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Other Amount

I know how hard you work for every dollar, and I will never take your
support for granted. Thank you so much for anything you can chip in to
help us win this critical race.

-- Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1631%2E3611125%2EJwAm6W

Adam Laxalt

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Van=20Taylor?=
subject: yikes...can't believe they said this >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us17.campaign-archive.com/?e=9920087750&u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=bed3440213)
---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=b5b8491194&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

Did you see what the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee tweeted? **_The national campaign arm for Democrats had the audacity to praise Joe Biden for gas prices dropping ... by TWO CENTS - after it has increased almost 50% since he took office!_**
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=731d05a2ee&e=9920087750)
---
| | Not only is this embarrassingly tone deaf, but it ultimately shows how little they care about the issues affecting all us each and every day. name: POLLING@JohnCranley.com
subject: Ohioans deserve better than “C-” infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
John knows that we need an upgrade. | **_Ohio earned a “C-” on our 2021 infrastructure report card from the American Society of Civil Engineers. John Cranley KNOWS we need to do better. _** Folks — In Cincinnati, John helped pass a plan that makes a historic investment in the city’s infrastructure, and he’s seen first-hand what investing in infrastructure can do for a community’s growth. But, it’s a different story across Ohio, and a C- just won’t cut it. We deserve roads that aren’t filled with potholes, clean water systems that don't fail us, and public schools that aren’t run down. Our communities can’t thrive without the infrastructure to support them. That’s why improving our state’s inadequate infrastructure is key to John’s plans to create a comeback for our state. But he wants to hear from you! **_[Do YOU think Ohio’s infrastructure needs a 21st century upgrade? Tell us right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346560/319426050/-1607822572?refcode=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBjNTAzYy00NzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6TrztQWSGj9vflqtHy4neJlslaRc-BctZlRE_K7Insk=&emci=7b5da45f-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)_** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346561/319426051/-1607822572?refcode=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBjNTAzYy00NzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6TrztQWSGj9vflqtHy4neJlslaRc-BctZlRE_K7Insk=&emci=7b5da45f-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346562/319426052/-1607822572?refcode=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTBjNTAzYy00NzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6TrztQWSGj9vflqtHy4neJlslaRc-BctZlRE_K7Insk=&emci=7b5da45f-8154-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a10c503c-4755-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=22604289)

name: MattandCynthiaforRI.com
subject: WATCH: Governor McKee MUST address this crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3150?t=1009&akid=307%2E43343%2EmnMh31 ]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island

Team,

Matt and Cynthia are fighting for a Rhode Island for all — and they've
spent the week at #SleepOutRI, joined by dozens of activists and housing
advocates from across the state.

Freezing temperatures are already here. Unhoused Rhode Islanders
can’t wait. Governor McKee cannot ignore the housing crisis any longer.

Our team put together a video to help explain what’s going on, including
highlights from Friday’s rally during Governor McKee’s tree lighting
ceremony.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3151?t=1010&akid=307%2E43343%2EmnMh31 ]Watch our video, and then we need to get loud! Can you share our video
with your community on social media to help us keep the pressure on
Governor McKee and the entire establishment?

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3151?t=1011&akid=307%2E43343%2EmnMh31 ]Video of the RI Sleep Out with a play button

clean_body: [ ]Matt and Cynthia for Rhode Island Team, Matt and Cynthia are fighting for a Rhode Island for all — and they've spent the week at #SleepOutRI, joined by dozens of activists and housing advocates from across the state. Freezing temperatures are already here. Unhoused Rhode Islanders can’t wait. Governor McKee cannot ignore the housing crisis any longer. Our team put together a video to help explain what’s going on, including highlights from Friday’s rally during Governor McKee’s tree lighting ceremony. [ ]Watch our video, and then we need to get loud! Can you share our video with your community on social media to help us keep the pressure on Governor McKee and the entire establishment? [ ]Video of the RI Sleep Out with a play button [ ]SHARE ON TWITTER [ ]SHARE ON FACEBOOK Matt and Cynthia are prepared to fight as long as it takes to ensure every Rhode Islander has safe and dignified housing this winter. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Great NEWS! Check This Out...
body:
If We Will FIGHT, We Will WIN! Every day I get emails and messages on social media of people all over this country reporting back that the COVID19 Re
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1695418.1018.1.d1651193f51d1618189b8742dfc67c3d) |
---
## If We Will FIGHT, We Will WIN!
---
|
---
Every day I get emails and messages on social media of people all over this country reporting back that the COVID19 Religious Exemption that I signed for them was accepted and they were able to keep their job without taking the jab.
Now some may wonder: "Why did they not want to take the vaccine?" The answer is: "That's none of our business."
If we do not fight for our freedoms, we will lose them.
However, **if we FIGHT, we WIN!**
I share these 2 testimonies with you because I believe they are powerful reminders to keep on fighting.
Things look bad now, but we are experiencing victories all across the country.
I want to thank you for helping spread word about the COVID19 Religious Exemption form. I have now signed over 50,000 COVID19 Religious Exemptions so far. If you would not have taken the time to share the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition with people you know then word would not have spread that there is help.
If you have donated, I want to say thank you because without those funds we would not have been able to increase the capacity of our website to handle all the traffic and process all the requests.
The giving of your finances and time to share the link www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomnadate has helped save **THOUSANDS** of jobs in this country.
This is something I have been able to do as a local Pastor in Tulsa. I believe if I am elected to the US Senate that I will be able to do even more to help the great people of our country.
**In order to be elected I need your help.** My 3 requests remain the same from day 1:
1\. Pray for me & the campaign
2\. Spread word about the campaign on social media and share the link www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate w/5 people to sign the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition.
3\. Financially support the campaign. Every dollar is a bullet in this war for freedom. www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate
1. | Pray for me & the campaign
---|---
2. | Spread word about the campaign on social media and share the link www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate w/5 people to sign the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition.
---|---
3. | Financially support the campaign. Every dollar is a bullet in this war for freedom. www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate
---|---
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Click Here To Join The Fight Against VACCINE MANDATES ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1695418.1019.1.40ad33ae1ad54b04624e961d22299dee)
---

---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1695418.1020.1.aa83c7b3a5402f2d1fd935cef171bacd) https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/615308
---
## Support MyPillow.com
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=1695418.1021.1.d9fdb1af63170292f2b65cae30d540b2)
---
My friend, Mike Lindell, is having another Sale at www.MyPillow.com on some amazing products.
Kendra and I love our MyPillow.com towels and bed sheets!
Support Mike by shopping this Christmas season at www.MyPillow.com and use the Promo Code **JACKSON** to save up to 66%!

name: Dr.  Bob Lorinser
subject: Inflation in rural Michigan hits hard – How did we get here?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
To get the economy back to normal, we must reduce the damage of the pandemic by getting vaccinated. Inflation hits rural communities the hardest. We must find equilibrium between supply/demand and ignite the labor force. Serious solutions require everyone to get serious about fighting the pandemic. **To get the economy back to normal, we must reduce the damage of the pandemic by getting vaccinated** **_Inflation hits rural communities the hardest. We must find equilibrium between supply/demand and ignite the labor force. Serious solutions require everyone to get serious about fighting the pandemic._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346689/319427030/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) Friend, I know the holiday season can be financially tight for citizens of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula, but if you can afford it, **[your generosity](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346690/319427031/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=)** to my campaign will help me fight for better economic policy initiatives in Congress that will benefit hard working families. [HELP ME FIGHT
FOR RURAL MICHIGAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346691/319427032/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346692/319427033/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) This, [**from NPR**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346693/319427034/-1820860225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=&emci=1dfe8fae-4055-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9581f1b3-4a55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) yesterday: "So far the U.S. has recovered about 82% of the jobs lost during the pandemic. But 2.4 million others who left the workforce when the coronavirus struck have not yet returned. It's not clear when — or even if — they will." "We all thought there would be a significant increase in labor supply and it hasn't happened. So you ask, 'Why?' There's tremendous uncertainty around that, but a big part of it is clearly linked to the ongoing pandemic." – Federal Reserve chairman Jerome Powell to Senate Committee **One of the most effective measures we can take locally to get the economy back to normal is to decrease the damage of COVID by getting vaccinated. ** **What caused the big jump in inflation?**
1. The COVID pandemic resulted in the collapse of the economy and supply-side shortages, which still exist today.
2. The US government stimulus with trillions of dollars in buying power meant to keep workers “alive” when their job disappeared but nowhere to spend it on.
3. When the vaccine arrived, we experienced unexpected rapid recovery of Americans resuming spending with penned up money and penned up need chasing limited items since the supply chain shortages, worldwide and domestic, aren’t back to normal.

The result: Inflation — more money chasing scarce items causing misery for the consumer. Prices of food and energy, which are set on world markets, have risen sharply everywhere. For us Americans, prices are up over the last year.\
* Bacon 20%
* Egg prices 12%.
* Gasoline up 50%

**How long will it last?** As long as companies and the supply side chain struggles to keep up with the demand for goods and services. I hope not long, but relief will not be immediate. **What can be done?**
* Fix the supply side chain globally
* End the COVID pandemic globally
* Let the Feds address monetary policy – interest rates and money supply.

We have previously encountered national and global problems and succeeded. We will do so again, but both the pandemic and inflation hit rural communities the hardest. It is essential Congress prioritize initiatives to end the pandemic, get people back to work, and stabilize the economy. Healthy communities and a workforce with job security and confidence in the future can soften the blow of high inflation. Let’s move forward with vaccinations and ignite the economy with healthy and employed workers. We will get through this. – Dr. Bob Lorinser [HELP ME FIGHT
FOR RURAL MICHIGAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346694/319427035/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346695/319427036/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346696/319427037/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=) If you believe you received this message in error, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1dfe8fae-4055-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/9581f1b3-4a55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTgxZjFiMy00YTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1KTdM75VXr1yFDlJ7JPxRLsyYAJlKgcA6rBBH4b1zg=&id=116937387). It is essential Congress prioritize initiatives to end the pandemic, get people back to work, and stabilize the economy. Healthy communities and a workforce with job security and confidence in the future can soften the blow of high inflation. Let’s move forward with vaccinations and ignite the economy with healthy and employed workers. We will get through this. – Dr. Bob Lorinser = = = If you believe you received this message in error, please . PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Senators Vow to Defund Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn't whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate's announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun's letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden's vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden's un-American policy - or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can't wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[ Please help us elect more courageous conservatives! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935963:6lc8TQEvN:m:1:3253819041:1911636819D7E35DA065D75634489B6D:r) **

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

** [ We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935963:6lc8TQEvN:m:1:3253819041:1911636819D7E35DA065D75634489B6D:r) **

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[ Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935963:6lc8TQEvN:m:1:3253819041:1911636819D7E35DA065D75634489B6D:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
|
---
| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935963:6lc8TQEvN:m:1:3253819041:1911636819D7E35DA065D75634489B6D:r "DONATE")

Washington, DC 20003

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Roe v. Wade (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346738/319427600/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZlMjVlMC00YzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxEAPjCB2o4s6iP0kYIQ7b7Eicekg5invBTtXyQ4JOg=&emci=5aae730b-4855-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=28fe25e0-4c55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, just days ago, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could directly overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and dismantle women’s health care rights. This is the same Supreme Court that is now stacked with conservative judges that Donald Trump nominated. **It can seem unthinkable, but it’s real and it’s imminent.** _Roe v. Wade_ is more at risk of being overturned right now than it has been since it was decided nearly 50 years ago. **This is bad for women and everyone who believes in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose.** We need to act quickly at the federal level. We need to make sure that the reproductive rights of every woman, no matter what state she lives in, are protected. [**I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , which would protect women’s reproductive rights no matter what the Court does next. Will you add your name to call on the U.S. Senate to pass this bill? Time is of the essence here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346739/319427601/1680769979?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZlMjVlMC00YzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxEAPjCB2o4s6iP0kYIQ7b7Eicekg5invBTtXyQ4JOg=&emci=5aae730b-4855-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=28fe25e0-4c55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39346740/319427602/1680769979?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211204_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZlMjVlMC00YzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxEAPjCB2o4s6iP0kYIQ7b7Eicekg5invBTtXyQ4JOg=&emci=5aae730b-4855-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=28fe25e0-4c55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Update on my race!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
We’ve had a busy week in CA-26! [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fa2d86d0756f48f58463bd9ff653c5a2&_e=wnH8Ajiu5EynTBF8Vhv3mobwurXBI6zfzctilI2-GnkODelhmGtm69XxdhzUTfkkqaVKZpqDHgoNzfC5XNkd8OTQ1oLy4iLy68KNrBJfG5LvlwbBl5XsanidPt4KsOHso3VBlKBDQtkocbL495c9HDkrCj2Qr7SYeiQsjObdMWHFXiXn1yNwJiC0y9sIji0zkmvJTLaDIilFAxUydk1oy9D3ST5ZQXZRX8_cUFS8tACwFk_-lS7WC9SBcxjA450gYlMA58jVMqk5CK0YAx6WVg%3D%3D) Dear Peter, I wanted to wish you a happy weekend – and let you know what we’ve been up to in the community over the past week or so. Before Thanksgiving, my sons and I dropped off food and toiletries at Manna Conejo Valley Food Bank – a wonderful local nonprofit whose mission for the last 40+ years has been “to feed hungry people in the Conejo Valley.” (Check out Manna at **[mannaconejo.org](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fa2d86d0756f48f58463bd9ff653c5a2&_e=wnH8Ajiu5EynTBF8Vhv3mrSL3J6onK-kMwb_zCg7TfNowunnirfhe0dZXfH0ixC-Z33ElOkBuC2llS4b0DWbPYZYqn8PFofD-noPh6fTN5wBcCZHFHEn6iQZ79B2ESO_cW8fZxII5o9rLNZIcN7oyeHytxv2DS5moOj120cqc6d0qX8lV2aBH3aqcHVqJ0SG4xRloxjryLdd9soAEhlrc_m0NBnM6P4-jrJ4Ixy1PHQLiFfLBUGR_Ol_42zFvHcC2nG_71cjJu0COVY3yi4FeHbk6ZFIIRmrUvWR2ZOtpeJunAY_NpEs5kUxS4pLbUJ7VcR3OrTIjfDBpar7zJFQGMXhvQ0R3sbv1NUYTBVkhLQPvl_KRSJ80GiGTGE1Bj7R4rUqQGoiR6hOU41irtGIXVuYzLgsuRWg0W3918BgM1TEKCLW0hIBYYVpQZRyhILw-nFnjyYX4zb61H3gjEpdJ2SlVPN_RxqZKpB56jC955K2M6PDj3jM1GLUd8YLe15PlZtX6MplCoQZdQ7osNggrgfda0NUWXaYZY5_3FrEn5NbKxW_06xPkqCSUlTjxJ-QBpTjZ61HKX5sTRIcL_Z2BVR39apvHj96-XtEmqKFVy0TbuDXuZARk4Mt1HOFhS40x5cYeh3QlcjexLi1WNHvCDFT_hwG-qneMIlB4AEBPVTz_Eo_KgOQtym1MQZw7-1gaY63YMt9Y8_o3BgEKaCRZc88M8uqq4mQFnYjQU0CRGmv6-hcKU_jTk37Xgu4ER4Y-Yt91lMSLyCY8kjIVHV3pg%3D%3D)**.) Julie and I had a great time Thanksgiving morning at the Simi Valley 5K Turkey Trot – a fantastic event with hundreds of runners (and walkers) of all speeds. We hosted family Thanksgiving dinner at our home that evening, and the festivities continued over the weekend with Hannukah – a holiday that represents the triumph of religious freedom over oppression. We also celebrated the end of a great AYSO soccer season with a pizza party at local favorite **[Toppers Pizza](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fa2d86d0756f48f58463bd9ff653c5a2&_e=wnH8Ajiu5EynTBF8Vhv3muIUiNiazb7KuKsrtfTrRoNaOKfPrgJCVw-HvVA9eymqe8s0oM4hY2jIGxs4nJAUoeHD-OmnGLLqvLuGWhbhToK-vwb6auTa_H7_UWQ-PK-pp3iSXU5ZGVXGmQdzev_wufMvG4M9EcQen2IbZGgoZeEC1MfeMtLYUCe5-cYNzSI8284676CTiVY4xpkoeoBuLT8evnhrdROj4_vPcVKlBQe02VCzFPpTp9CzbQtxkQTxLckYUcBOGtm0hvaYlEcgOQ%3D%3D)**. I loved coaching my son Ben and his teammates this year – and seeing their confidence, skills and friendships grow over the season. Special thanks to the many dedicated AYSO volunteers in this community for everything you do for our kids. Later in the week, I met with the Founder and Chairman of **[Bio Science Alliance](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fa2d86d0756f48f58463bd9ff653c5a2&_e=wnH8Ajiu5EynTBF8Vhv3mgP4JfyW5MID3nK9MomfeHD94ptgDQ6knHjUTLXkndl0T3O210EHeuJ_EnPYkaZ2auaYakeSq1W7ZvYZtXX-hW77FDqr6OHyy7cWoLr04jMvvCd-wuwnW3zR7JlZ_B34eBVtFp4MnLlGHZh5TD01w3fxVBX7JSLJH-t8sKABJh23KwvNDdAcw7BTjYOWz9ADmWvcjOIWGizGLYgMl6-t9gN6PntO1eaLZgFWtgFONwdyXA91GpoxfJntWiMyhXJhwQ%3D%3D)** – a local nonprofit devoted to developing the life sciences industry in Ventura County and surrounding areas (like Agoura and Calabasas). Our community has the intellectual talent, cutting-edge facilities, and venture capital to become a regional (even national) leader in life sciences and biotech. The private sector is leading this charge – as it should – and I’m excited to see the great local jobs, economic growth and life-saving innovations that result. Also this week, I had the opportunity to meet with Thousand Oaks Police Chief Jeremy Paris, Deputy Sheriff Wendell Campbell, several other officers, and a number of community members at an event in Thousand Oaks hosted by Unity to Spark Change -- a grassroots organization that builds bridges between law enforcement and community members. We're blessed in this community to have amazing law enforcement officers – and outstanding citizens like Mike Wing, who founded Unity to Spark Change (and who also happens to be my childhood friend). Congratulations to Mike for recently receiving the Ventura County Sheriff's Office "Outstanding Citizen Award”! It was a pleasure seeing old friends and making new ones at a meet-and-greet in Moorpark on Wednesday. Huge thank you to my friends Dee-Dee and John Davidson for hosting us at your beautiful home – and for bringing together so many people who care deeply about our country and community. Please be sure to visit us next Saturday, December 11, at the Camarillo Christmas Parade (flyer below). I’ll be out there all day with our wonderful volunteers and would love to see you in person then. Finally, if you haven’t seen our new campaign video yet, please check it out below or on our **[website here](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=fa2d86d0756f48f58463bd9ff653c5a2&_e=Ae1QHgo2pH9YfKE8O7uWayKrsA1geEu_oezwQZLgg14VM2DzyNVs315V5RFHo8h-ioD66zi757yuUbQr1BdNxTumWNDQx9clslq2J8xQgb8PfU80xoj2PwAOw_oKi5LbE8x8VM_LPoQKmWZZ8ocVlN3l8pkV3__BofS7JiG9pgFpscmYHx2FiIaGn_Wff0DqYKj-Krl67GmRcJRKjqSHcIhhXPN7lItL-yXF6AVfUYAdEgAonI6-biwZQ6Es7UAtfgFaRbi4Jda9MaWBVt9H9Q%3D%3D)**. And as always, don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions about the campaign. [ | | |

name: Steve
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Jim and his family lost power recently. [unsubscribe](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtUMmKhTAA-xo9lm52OXiY4eF_dLFatVVrXb9-fPeBQCCEJMTW2lGCRelrDDFCGFYQIUEqgECDfsWHkqZpJKyIpAWFKrTJGxUXlZOfs1V-ukFsc9nXDDlZSeeQpdxUrWw1cq7lCr6CEsaUoaZQYMiFKKe6z3kpyE-Bmxc5KTOCf7PNHL4e0lz7VJDPoDg0C76One3pXKue3NZmpCg08Z6uZdSsFfMlrQpUm66P5HDLJXY8TPPuzud66CY669PhzuPuoscohEFozrhZ4yrXddPZoNElmYTTrMCs9f1bPD5BxC0PbElh4Lp_-DYcR7y3lROtur5MtV1OP01-Y_w9qgvv_O_6MtcXSCQICAEicgFRro9LL6kUJejHvA8dYFTNGThOLQFx3_4Awy-GqQ)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor, 4Patriots.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator – a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://mgemail.americanpatriotdaily.net/c/eJxtkUuupSAARFdzHRq-AgMH3XlxHwgognARwd_q2zfvpJKaVNXglO7HiWDEm6VHAEGIAAUQckxb2A7wL_8heBgGASgW5EOADCYvSsYkS16-RctlvdtoSmN7g6FQmiutFBRCAyo6ahSfJJRTRwlpQk8AR4Bx3qy9LSV98J8PGl6VLJVv_7utvuE3g4errB_8wyqxlT3OnUWFiKugWN4rtIWtiG6Wb4BKFxgh6jHbN9IrrmB8CLkfucsNhclHOE1MgKwinHM2zmEUTrdPlioa_H0tfp6RVmi7GWFkNNuaAS2X12HcHYPAuUfpMcFKlht3yZSiq6yUZ_OIczTzxX0QoSsW24O6Ug8haUVgMyrX52QVJS7IjdQuNsPos8hdVISQdnF1ZwhTLfHOIREkDRDMsw4dfr-jvy6pN-O_XdKJHXvHZkKm44M6s9gXjH8Cj3txXcrBsdE-bHfHEe99Y3iUs21yr9O5rOvyVt8j5_Di_aXblP5qMw4cgBZikdootmfKr8kcRWt9qW5uOyK_pZ0Y0biNdf8HsWG-TQ)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too – no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. name: Team AOC
subject: Read: AOC’s NYT Interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In an interview with The New York Times, Alexandria shared her thoughts on the state of the Democratic party.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211204-2671-header&t=1&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh)
In an interview with The New York Times, Alexandria shared her thoughts on the state of the Democratic party, how we can motivate our base to turn out, and the importance of delivering on our promises.
_We wanted to share the interview with Alexandria below which has been lightly edited and condensed for clarity._
* * *
**Why do you feel this social policy bill has to pass as soon as possible, at the biggest scale possible?**
I think the stakes are really, really high.
The entire reason that the Progressive Caucus gave their votes [for the infrastructure bill] was based on direct promises from the president, as well as direct promises from more conservative Democratic holdouts. And from House leadership as well. So if those promises don’t follow through, it’s going to be very, very difficult for them to get votes on anything moving forward, because the trust that was already so delicate will have been broken.
**Do you think these extended negotiations and the stuff that was cut will have an electoral effect? Obviously the Senate will have its say, but if the spending bill largely looks like what the House passed this week, will Democrats say it fulfills the promise of Election Day?**
I think that if we pass the Build Back Better Act as the House passed it, that we have a shot to go back to our communities and say we delivered. But that’s not to say that this process has not been demoralizing for a lot of folks, because there were enormous promises made. Not just at the beginning, and not just during the election, but that continued to be made.
And this is where I have sounded the alarm, because what really dampens turnout is when Democrats make promises that they don’t keep.
With the bipartisan infrastructure plan, there’s all of these headlines going around. And I understand the political importance of making a victory lap. But I think that the worst and most vulnerable position we could be in is to over-promise and under-deliver.
So let’s not go around and say, “We’re going to replace every lead pipe in this country,” because according to the bipartisan infrastructure plan, that is not going to happen. That has not been funded. And if the Build Back Better Act gets cut even further, then that’s definitely not going to happen.
**You and other progressives backed Biden during the general election. Do you feel that this White House has continued to be open to the left?**
And that created trust, because trust requires vulnerability from all parties.
There was some good faith with the American Rescue Plan [Democrats’ $1.9 trillion economic stimulus package, signed in March]. But after that, which was quite early, it’s been a bit of a slog.
I actually don’t direct this critique directly at the White House. I think, in general, the party doesn’t quite fully grasp what is happening in deep-blue communities.
**What is it that you say they’re missing?**
The talking points are not enough.
Yes, is child care great? Absolutely. Universal pre-K, this is something I’m deeply, deeply supportive of. But we also have too much of a top-down strategy when it comes to our base. We’re always giving them the medicine and telling them what they need to accept, as opposed to really monitoring where the energy is, and being responsive to it. And allowing that to shape our strategy.
And even with the infrastructure plan, this kind of investment is deeply needed in underserved communities like the Bronx. However, if we as a party are asking every single person in this party to take a victory lap, and do a news conference in front of a bridge or pothole, and we aren’t funding and actually fixing that pothole, I’m very concerned about how people are going to interpret that a year from now.
**But doesn’t the White House agree — didn’t it propose a more robust package? The obvious response here is that the administration faces the reality of a 50-50 Senate.**
There is an enormous amount of executive action that they’re sitting on that I think is underutilized. On student loans. We’ve got executive action on the table with respect to climate. There are certainly things that we can do with immigration.
So why are we taking this as a legislative compromise, when the opportunity is so much greater, or when Biden could do this stuff with a stroke of a pen, and is just reminding us that he’s choosing not to?
We always try to tell people why they need to settle for less, instead of being able to harness the energy of our grass roots and take political risks in service of them, the same way that we take political risks in service of swing voters. We can do both.
**Is this frustration a growing sentiment in the Democratic congressional caucus? Or is this just you?**
Frustration is there, and it’s part of why the Progressive Caucus was holding out on passing both of these two pieces of legislation together, because we’re like, listen, we’re not going to take these empty promises anymore.
We went from the American Rescue Plan to six months of watching us just hand the pen to Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema. If you even look at the [infrastructure bill], it was drafted in the Senate, and they didn’t even allow conferencing with the House version. They said you just need to take this legislation as is — no compromises, no edits, nothing.
You’ve got to give me something to work with, with my communities. And if you’re not, how can I make the argument that they should turn out again? And this notion that saying “We’re not Trump” is enough — this is such a deeply demoralizing message.
Democrats have a trifecta and have been unable to pass voting-rights protections. And so people can wring their hands and say “but Manchin” all they want, or “but the filibuster” all they want, but at the end of the day, what people see are the results of their actions and the results of investing their time.
We are up against political nihilism. The idea that nothing we do matters, because as long as I live in the Bronx, the political reality of this country is that no one’s going to fight for me. That is why it’s so important that we take some of these risks for our base.
**Your party is trying to project political victory at this moment — and pulling out all the stops to do so. You’re sounding the alarm.**
Before the Virginia elections, it was very clear that our help and our participation was not wanted or asked for, which is fine. I’m not here to tell people how to run their races. But at the same time, to consider the members here that have some of the tightest relationships to our political base as just a uniform liability — and not something that can be selectively deployed, or consulted, or anything — I think it’s just sad. I think it was a mistake.
And we saw a big youth turnout collapse. Not a single person asked me to send an email, not even to my own list. And then they turn around and say, “It’s their fault.” When I think it was communicated quite expressly that we were unwelcome to pitch in.
The idea that we just accept a collapse in youth turnout — and essentially turn it into a self- fulfilling prophecy — in times when races are decided by such narrow margin points: I think it’s ill-advised.
* * *
Thank you for reading. [If you are able, please consider making a donation to keep Alexandria in Congress and help grow our grassroots movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211203?refcode=em20211204-2671-P_FND_EXP_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2671_2526796_Tv41Zh&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211203?refcode=em20211204-2671-P_FND_EXP_HDL&t=3&refcode2=2671_2526796_Tv41Zh&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211204-2671-P_FND_EXP_HDL&t=4&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2671%2E2526796%2ETv41Zh)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6530%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2b5uNb1xrA89uas5hsTWn6Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68504%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0aZHPKqMO5b1SSeqDcEbYQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68504%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0aZHPKqMO5b1SSeqDcEbYQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, ** ** As you know, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. ** ** And one way to honor the brave soldiers who fought in World War II is to study the conflict itself--its causes, how it was fought, and its implications on the present day. ** ** To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course about the war, “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the war’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. ** ** I hope you find this course as important and fascinating as I do. The strength and bravery of American soldiers during one of the darkest times in human history stands as one of the great moments in our nation’s proud history. It’s a history we must learn, cherish, and share. ** ** **You can access your free online course, “Second World Wars,” now using this secure link: ** **[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68515%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bVXEiPqxv%2fGYu50AfnkgHQ&sysid=1)** Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |
#
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6530%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=%2b5uNb1xrA89uas5hsTWn6Q&sysid=1)_

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6538%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=wocZ%2fOzInGNi%2fBMYikFSDw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68509%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T6F6DrH%2fC8z0QDzR6liK0A&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68500%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vZFZwhwGz%2fFpuTWgDssghw&sysid=1)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Lying and deceiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Can you believe this guy? No, no you cannot.
#
Hey Derek, did you see this message from John?
First, Dr. Oz (yes, the one who sold your aunt that fake diet pill) announced he’s running to be Pennsylvania’s next U.S. senator. Then, he spent at least $1.2 million of his OWN MONEY on a massive TV ad buy.
Let us be real clear, Derek: **Dr. Oz built his entire career around lying and tricking people for fame and fortune.**
Why, then, should we believe his campaign will be any different?
If you want a Pennsylvania senator who is a self-funding millionaire, has a loooong history of deceiving hard working Americans for personal gain, and lives in New Jersey (?!), Dr. Oz is your guy.
But if you’re ready for a senator who actually represents the working people and families of the great Commonwealth of Pennsylvania (and actually lives here 😂), **[could you chip in $5 today to help grow our grassroots and people-powered campaign?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37919?refcode=em20211204-3701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)**
**[Donate now»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37919?refcode=em20211204-3701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)**
Thanks, Derek.
–Team Fetterman

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: John Fetterman
Date: Fri, Dec 3, 2021
Subject: Bad news re: Dr. Oz
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Derek,
Not even two days after launching his campaign, Dr. Oz just booked $1.2 million (at least) in TV ads to try to buy this Senate seat. With a reported net worth of $100 million, Oz can spend virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. 🔴
**This is a pivotal moment for our campaign, Derek. I *truly* believe that how we respond to this could make or break us.** We’ve got two options:
1. We either stand by while this celeb pseudoscientist buys his way into the U.S. Senate — where he’ll have an even _bigger_ stage to push right-wing policies and COVID conspiracies.

**\- OR -**

2. We raise up a grassroots army so freaking big that we can match him dollar-for-dollar, flip PA blue, and send a true Pennsylvania fighter for working people to the Senate.

[**_What do you say, Derek? Can I get you to donate $5 now to help us fight back against this $1.2 million TV ad onslaught from Dr. Oz? Every bit helps._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37919?refcode=em20211204-3701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)
**[Fight Back: Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37919?refcode=em20211204-3701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yes, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yes, he’s spent the last decade profiting off of provably false obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
Yeah, his home isn’t even in Pennsylvania ... it’s in New Jersey.
**But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated.** His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016.
With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to win not only the Republican nomination, but the whole damn thing.
**The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment.** We have — by far — the biggest grassroots campaign in the state. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why I’m asking you right now...
[**_Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s six-figure TV ad onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37919?refcode=em20211204-3701&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)
Oz is a big threat. But he’s no match for our movement. 💪💪💪
Let’s win this thing,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211204-3701-footer&t=42&refcode2=3701_434096_-kCkgP&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=43&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=3701%2E434096%2E-kCkgP)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Four relationships dominate Genesis
body:
I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z23ta06e9gq9u872f9d6vocc34psmk2ru30t6ha0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdimeo32c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is still available online for free!

In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Professor Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course is perfect for personal study, viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs. **[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/genesis](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zedsksr7urv1h5t4l39uo0mfgq5gatd4rvcjb1i0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sdimeo32c3h2bs)** Please use the secure link above to explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:

Peter, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _ "really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935971:6ZhW8QENo:m:1:3253819041:6887F64FCF2D90463BA5C55C23E3A87B:r)
__
Peter, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_" I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It's clear all the power has gotten to his head and it's about time we send him home.

**If you 're with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you'll chip in now: [https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58935971:6ZhW8QENo:m:1:3253819041:6887F64FCF2D90463BA5C55C23E3A87B:r)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that's why he's spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__

name: Team Schrier
subject: "Supreme Court signals support for Mississippi 15-week abortion ban with Roe v. Wade in balance"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization earlier this week -- a case that could decide the fate of Roe v. Wade. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, it's clear that our reproductive rights are in serious danger. **Supreme Court signals support for Mississippi 15-week abortion ban with Roe v. Wade in balance**
_\-- USA Today, 12/1/21_
Peter,

The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ earlier this week -- a case that could decide the fate of _Roe v. Wade_. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, it's clear that our reproductive rights are in serious danger.

Republicans see this case as the opportunity they've been waiting for to roll back abortion rights for millions of Americans. Already this year, Republicans in state legislatures across the country have passed restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace, and if the Supreme Court ruling overturns _Roe_ , access to a safe and legal abortion would be banned or limited in 22 states overnight.

**We can't let that happen.**

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows how important it is that every person has access to the reproductive health care they need. That's why she was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act to protect _Roe_ and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care.

Kim will always fight to ensure these deeply personal decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only -- but we need the Senate to act.

clean_body: The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization earlier this week -- a case that could decide the fate of Roe v. Wade. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, it's clear that our reproductive rights are in serious danger. Supreme Court signals support for Mississippi 15-week abortion ban with Roe v. Wade in balance \-- USA Today, 12/1/21 Peter, The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization earlier this week -- a case that could decide the fate of Roe v. Wade. With a 6-3 conservative majority on the Court, it's clear that our reproductive rights are in serious danger. Republicans see this case as the opportunity they've been waiting for to roll back abortion rights for millions of Americans. Already this year, Republicans in state legislatures across the country have passed restrictive abortion legislation at a record pace, and if the Supreme Court ruling overturns Roe , access to a safe and legal abortion would be banned or limited in 22 states overnight. We can't let that happen. As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows how important it is that every person has access to the reproductive health care they need. That's why she was proud to help pass the Women's Health Protection Act to protect Roe and block states from enacting medically unjustified barriers to accessing abortion care. Kim will always fight to ensure these deeply personal decisions remain between a patient and their doctor only -- but we need the Senate to act. | Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939012:68iS8QENU:m:1:3298722022:DED3BA07C55E993ACE1D582153BA11A1:r)
Please choose one of the following options:

---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939012:68iS8QENU:m:1:3298722022:DED3BA07C55E993ACE1D582153BA11A1:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

He successfully blocked the Biden vaccination mandate for health care workers that would have devastated our Friend, This week was another busy one for Derek. He successfully blocked the Biden vaccination mandate for health care workers that would have devastated our rural health care providers, the hospitals and nursing homes already facing staff shortages that might not survive if they’re forced to fire staff over vaccine status.
Amid all the action, we were proud to welcome even more supporters to Team Schmidt. clean_body: Please give just $5 to help us close out 2021 as strongly as possible. | Peter, Thousands of patriots, including your friends, neighbors, and fellow conservatives, have stepped up to support my re-election campaign this year. But I was just going over a list of all of our 2021 Founding Members, and I noticed you haven’t accepted your membership or supported my campaign at all this year. I hate to think that I’d lost your support. You were one of my biggest grassroots champions in 2020, and you played a critical role in our upset victory over my radical Democrat opponent. With 2022 around the corner, I wanted to reach out and you personally to ask you to join my campaign one more time before the end of the year. This next month is going to make or break my re-election chances next November. We’ve got to stay on budget and finish the year in the strongest position we possibly can so we’re ready for whatever Pelosi and the Left throw at us in 2022. And we can’t do that without the support of grassroots Americans like you, Peter. $5 may not seem like a lot compared to Pelosi’s millions, but when every conservative does their part, it adds up quickly. The fate of my bellwether congressional district -- and the House majority -- is in your hands. I hope that you’ll come through for me like you did in 2020. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243
