name: Team Jayapal
subject: Do you agree? (Re: Roe v. Wade)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Did you see Pramila’s email from the other day, Peter? It’s a really important read.
**Reproductive rights are human rights — which is why Pramila helped pass the Women's Health Protection Act to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and a pregnant person’s right to a safe, legal abortion.**
Now, the Senate needs to do the same and protect abortion throughout America with unprecedented attacks on choice happening all across the country. [**Can you rush a donation of $3 or any amount to support Pramila’s work to end the filibuster — so we can get the Women’s Health Protection Act to President Biden’s desk as soon as possible?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8989?refcode=em20211204-853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)
You can read Pramila’s original email below.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Thu, Dec 2, 2021
Subject: End the filibuster and pass the Women’s Health Protection Act — so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law once and for all.
Peter,
Yesterday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case concerning Mississippi’s dangerous abortion ban. This cruel law represents the biggest threat to _Roe v. Wade_ in nearly 50 years.
This is personal for me and millions of people across America. I’m not only a Congresswoman, the chair of the Progressive Caucus, and a dedicated member of the Pro-Choice Caucus. I’m not only an organizer who knows that reproductive rights are human rights. **I’m also one of the one in four women in America who has had an abortion.**
Inaction is not an option right now. We must fight back. That begins by ending the filibuster and passing the Women’s Health Protection Act through the Senate — _so we can codify Roe v. Wade into law once and for all._ [**Can you chip in $3 to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect reproductive freedom nationwide?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8989?refcode=em20211204-853&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8989?refcode=em20211204-853&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8989?refcode=em20211204-853&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)**
For me, terminating my pregnancy was not an easy choice — but it was MY choice. Because of the cruel Mississippi abortion ban and the other abortion bans currently being litigated, many people may not have the same choice as I did.
Peter, it is nobody’s business what choices we as pregnant people make about our own bodies. This is a constitutionally protected, intensely personal choice about control of our own bodies. And the consequences of that choice are ones that only WE will have to live with.
We must organize for reproductive justice as we protest against these cruel bans in Mississippi, Texas, and too many other states. That’s why I was so proud to help pass the Women’s Health Protection Act through the House earlier this year so we can combat these attacks. **Now, it’s time to END the filibuster and pass this critical legislation through the Senate. It truly can’t wait.**
[**Chip in $3 or anything you can to support my work to end the filibuster and prorect abortion rights across the country. Time is running out to stop these cruel bans.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8989?refcode=em20211204-853&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)
Thank you for joining me, Peter. It really makes a difference.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211204-853-footer&t=24&refcode2=853_420207_Amh2vz&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=853%2E420207%2EAmh2vz)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Val via VPP
subject: BREAKING: Dr. Oz is officially in Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Here’s why he’s so dangerous:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4124?t=6&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n) | **BREAKING NEWS: Dr. Oz has officially jumped into Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate race.**

We’re counting on your support to defeat him and send a real doctor to the U.S. Senate. [Can you rush in any amount to power Val to victory?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4124?t=7&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4125?t=8&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
---
**TV personality Dr. Oz just announced that he’s running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**

Friend, we’ve seen what happens when TV personalities gain power in Washington. Former Trump advisor Dr. Oz is the _last person_ we need when Pennsylvania and our country are facing real challenges — **challenges like getting through the COVID-19 pandemic, helping folks get back to work, and tackling the climate crisis.**

Val is the only doctor in this race with a proven track record, **from fighting for her patients in the operating room to leading Pennsylvania’s third-largest county through COVID-19.**

That’s the kind of leadership needed now more than ever — not a TV personality who has peddled fake diet pills for profit and pushed unproven COVID-19 treatments.

This is our chance to reject pseudoscience and profiteering once and for all, and send a _real_ doctor to the U.S. Senate. But Dr. Oz is sitting on millions, and we’re counting on this grassroots team to help Val win the race that could decide whether Democrats keep the Senate majority.

[Please, rush in a donation of any amount — whether it’s $5, $10, or more — to help Dr. Val defeat Dr. Oz, protect our majority, and stand up for facts and science in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4126?t=9&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4125?t=10&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4127?t=11&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4128?t=12&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4129?t=13&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4124?t=14&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n)
All eyes are on this Senate race. Thanks for helping us show them what a people-first doctor looks like.

— Team Val
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=988%2E878179%2E1UGu0n) to request fewer emails. subject: On MSNBC re: Donald Trump and Sen. Grassley's rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39348047/319436168/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdjNGNmYi01ZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaiFmez-PTWxQ8Nr_yUKhhhJUtZR1G4WTvqqI1yTbY=)
Peter – When I was recently on MSNBC's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell, I talked about just how dangerous it was for my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) to rally with Donald Trump here in Iowa. **[If you're with me in this fight to defeat Sen. Grassley and the extremism of the Republican Party, can I ask you to chip in a grassroots donation of $5 before our midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39348048/319436169/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdjNGNmYi01ZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaiFmez-PTWxQ8Nr_yUKhhhJUtZR1G4WTvqqI1yTbY=)**
I won't mince words: The former president's conspiracy theories, radicalism and anti-democratic sentiments are dangerous. They have no place in Iowa or anywhere in else in the country. But Sen. Grassley has chosen to stand in lockstep with Donald Trump. By standing on stage with him at a MAGA rally, Sen. Grassley totally endorsed Trump's rhetoric and agenda. **I believe that makes Sen. Grassley unfit to serve.**
Our state deserves a senator who will fight for working families instead of spreading dangerous conspiracy theories – and our country deserves a Senate that will do the same. If we win here in Iowa, we can guarantee both – and our path to victory in Iowa has never been clearer.
**You see, Iowans are done with Sen. Grassley – only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him, and he's at his highest disapproval rating with Iowans in nearly two decades.****** Momentum is on our side, and I can promise you that no one is going to work harder than me to flip this seat blue. But it’s clear that Donald Trump will do everything he can to take back the Senate majority and make sure Sen. Grassley is reelected. I fully intend to win, but I need you to stand with me.
Peter, teams like this one have met the moment before, and we need to do it again when we're called upon. I'm committed to ending Donald Trump and Sen. Grassley's dangerous brand of Republicanism in the Senate, and I'm humbly asking for your support to help me do it: **[Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare before tonight's midnight deadline to defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa and stop Trump from taking back the Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39348049/319436170/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdjNGNmYi01ZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaiFmez-PTWxQ8Nr_yUKhhhJUtZR1G4WTvqqI1yTbY=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39348050/319436171/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdjNGNmYi01ZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaiFmez-PTWxQ8Nr_yUKhhhJUtZR1G4WTvqqI1yTbY=)

Thank you for your support. Together, I know that we will win.

Abby

body:
I am proud to be an American, and I think we live in the greatest country in the world.
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b622905bfc03491096b94adb267a58f5&_e=elDoY2MP-RjgL_3FPZetqUKLrnbFKX2j-NI6ij1OiQHcQGxuR3IFv_xp5DDIRKdDxXTdOQiRNAJ7W9MIj7JVcINViBPbaEQxllr2u1dLt0lD9EhOSojwW4SMxvr04nUWVRemshb3UT8F2Ib1lnkXhHGFy3ap4mdWWP3LGqf9SO_DJLJOnzP1H4V_Twcfs2XdjTNCaLIc0DM4AuGbnxsQ9ewvk-x-OAfLjBJHhAaNRqKilrk13b8Hi1e8DnS5mFqaes97YcyzOEn4QUe1ALRgLkJLTli9_-bbr0Sjn4n2hmLGMTRj0ZHhBnDdmCNbRXGgVpEP78OQx0VjDb-78RlOxPMt3bgbuXZnLLnXW0OaycwEGS-u3LgDjTCaygkyrSNdiK-VmBBZPqanbyPmGSX5UXyzfvkrWEtTBHEMi_Y8pv84_wal-jQLQR22V1jOwwA1lRnPK1DdDaomtbpUUbnuJg%3D%3D)

\-- Republicans have shattered **EIGHT** fundraising records in a row.
\-- They've taken the **LEAD** in the polls.

subject: I want to hear your thoughts on this

body:
We need your help to set our campaign’s agenda. Please, take a moment to
complete our priorities survey, and let our team know what’s most
important to you.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/survey/priorities_survey_20211204/?t=1003&akid=23%2E63204%2E2NHGBw ]BEGIN THE SURVEY

Hi Peter,

As you know by now, this campaign is all about the people, and my top
priority is making sure I’m standing up for people just like you. But to
do that, I need to be able to speak directly to what issues impact you and
your community.

I want this campaign to be a reflection of your values, and as the
people’s lawyer, I will always want to know what's on your mind. I’m
travelling across the state meeting New Yorkers from Buffalo to Rochester
to Syracuse to Long Island and across New York City, but you can help
inform our campaign by letting us know what you care about right now.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/survey/priorities_survey_20211204/?t=1004&akid=23%2E63204%2E2NHGBw ]Could you spare a quick moment to let me know where your priorities
lie? I want to make sure we’re setting the agenda that matters to you as
we build our campaign and look ahead to 2022.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/survey/priorities_survey_20211204/?t=1005&akid=23%2E63204%2E2NHGBw ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Thank you for everything you’ve already done to support our work, and I’m
grateful for your feedback.

I’ll be in touch soon,

Dan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Stop Vaccine Mandates
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jacobs4congress/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4996150?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon,

I wanted to make sure you saw **my latest article in the Buffalo News discussing my strong opposition to vaccine mandates.** [You can read that here.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b0e3020456&e=13f35c4add)

I’m vaccinated, and I encourage people to talk to their physician about getting vaccinated. HOWEVER, **I strongly oppose mandates and lockdowns, and I will continue to fight the vaccine mandates being pushed by President Biden and other elected officials. **

These mandates are unconstitutional. **They encroach on the freedom each American enjoys** to make the best medical decision for themselves, and **no one should face punishment, termination, or retaliation from elected officials for that decision. **

**The President’s vaccine mandates threaten our military readiness, our economic recovery, and the functioning of our government by forcing hard-working Americans off the job when we are already in the middle of a national labor shortage. **

**I am going to keep fighting these mandates, protect the freedoms we each enjoy, and work toward a prosperous and strong economic emergence from this pandemic – you have my word.
**
Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Supreme Court UPDATE
body:
NEW Federal Lawsuit on CRT Abuse!

[INSIDE JW]

THE SUPREME COURT SHOULD OVERTURN ROE V. WADE

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26408&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj16NFJ5cVZTcTdHWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]

The rule of law and our constitutional system was undermined by the
Roe v. Wade decision that led to the legalization of abortion on
demand.
In this regard, Judicial Watch filed an _amicus curiae_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26377&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RvYmJzLXYtamFja3Nvbi13b21lbnMtaGVhbHRoLWFtaWN1cy0xMzkyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
brief
in the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. Wade. Our brief
in support of the constitutionality of Mississippi’s Gestational
Age Act argues that states have the right under the Constitution to
regulate abortion and protect unborn life. (_Dobbs v. Jackson_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26374&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3VwcmVtZWNvdXJ0Lmdvdi9zZWFyY2guYXNweD9maWxlbmFtZT0vZG9ja2V0L2RvY2tldGZpbGVzL2h0bWwvcHVibGljLzE5LTEzOTIuaHRtbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No.
19-1392)).

Our brief argues
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26375&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RvYmJzLXYtamFja3Nvbi13b21lbnMtaGVhbHRoLWFtaWN1cy0xMzkyLXBnLTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that
the Supreme Court should overturn Roe and restore the regulation of
abortion to the states:

Despite creative judicial legislating, it is crystal clear that
abortion does not involve war, peace, negotiation, foreign commerce,
or taxation. Abortion fits squarely into the states’ sphere of
objects that concern the “lives, liberties, and properties of the
people.” Not being an enumerated power, the _Roe_ Court did not
have the authority to overturn the abortion laws of the states.
Additionally, our brief notes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26376&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RvYmJzLXYtamFja3Nvbi13b21lbnMtaGVhbHRoLWFtaWN1cy0xMzkyLXBncy0xNS0xNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that _Roe
v. Wade_ didn’t provide clarity, but instead muddied the waters:

Far from creating a national consensus, Roe threw the states into a
48-year contentious legal battle. Even some abortion advocates eschew
the injudicious method of federalizing abortion as short-circuiting a
naturally evolving jurisprudence under state laws. As federal and
state judges attempt to apply this Court’s precedents, a national
landscape of inconsistent, inconclusive, and untenable rules have
emerged. As a national policy, abortion jurisprudence is, in a word, a
mess. Stubbornly holding on to unconstitutional precedent will never
have a positive outcome. It is time to return abortion policy to the
states where it belongs and where the democratic process can
effectively work.
States must be able to defend life, and the disastrous Roe decision
has upended our constitutional order. The Supreme Court has a chance
to right a constitutional wrong in a way that will allow Americans
again to protect the right to life.

The Supreme Court is expected to rule by June of next year...

WHY NO ONE IS SURPRISED HILLARY CLINTON’S INFLUENCE-PEDDLING
FOUNDATION COLLAPSED

Per usual, Judicial Watch took the lead in exposing Bill and Hillary
Clinton’s shady dealings inside their “foundation,” especially
in the way they used it to sell influence. Now their foundation’s
fundraising is collapsing, which isn’t a surprise, as I detail in
this op-ed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26409&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kYWlseWNhbGxlci5jb20vMjAyMS8xMi8wMy9maXR0b24td2h5LWFic29sdXRlbHktbm8tb25lLWlzLXN1cnByaXNlZC1oaWxsYXJ5LWNsaW50b25zLWluZmx1ZW5jZS1wZWRkbGluZy1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLWNvbGxhcHNlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
for _Daily Caller_:

When one of the most recognizable nonprofits in the world loses 75%
of its contributions over a four-year period, there are typically
investigatory reports written into what has gone wrong. That isn’t
the case with the Clinton Foundation. The Foundation received
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26410&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYXhpb3MuY29tL2NsaW50b24tZm91bmRhdGlvbi1kb25hdGlvbnMtcGx1bW1ldC04N2JjNWNmMy00NjMzLTQ1NDQtYTI5ZC0zZjg0ZGFhM2JlM2YuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
$62.9
million in 2016 but only $16.3 million in 2020, and very few people
seem to have noticed.

That is because most Beltway insiders know the Clinton Foundation’s
primary purpose: to serve as a platform for Hillary Clinton’s
political operation while lining the Clintons’ pockets by trading
influence for money. That is why donations spiked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26411&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wcm9qZWN0cy5wcm9wdWJsaWNhLm9yZy9ub25wcm9maXRzL29yZ2FuaXphdGlvbnMvMzExNTgwMjA0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
when
Hillary was secretary of state and most of the world thought she was
destined to become president — and why they cratered after she lost.

Kevin Thurm, the CEO of the Clinton Foundation, tried to play off the
2020 decline off as pandemic-related. In a letter, he wrote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26412&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL3BvbGl0aWNzL2NsaW50b24tZm91bmRhdGlvbi1kb25hdGlvbnMtcGx1bmdlZC0yMDIwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that
2020 “was a difficult year for philanthropy. Across the sector,
resources were stretched thinly and fundraising activities were
impacted.” This argument doesn’t explain the tens of millions the
Foundation lost between 2016 and 2019 and ignores that charitable
giving was up by 5.1%
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26413&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmFycm9ucy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvY2hhcml0YWJsZS1naXZpbmctaW4tdGhlLXUtcy1yaXNlcy01LTEtdG8tYS1yZWNvcmQtdXMtNDcxLTQ0LWJpbGxpb24taW4tMjAyMC0wMTYyMzc5NzUxMT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
in
America last year.

Of course, an objective observer easily understands the real reason
the Clinton Foundation experienced such a sharp decline in
contributions since 2016. The Foundation is an influence-peddling
scheme, and the Clintons’ influence has waned. Even Obama understood
the scheme. When President Obama nominated Hillary Clinton in 2009 to
serve as secretary of state, she agreed to a strict memorandum of
understanding
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26414&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ292aW5mby5nb3YvY29udGVudC9wa2cvQ0hSRy0xMTFzaHJnNTQ2MTUvaHRtbC9DSFJHLTExMXNocmc1NDYxNS5odG0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to
wall off the Foundation from conflicts of interest with the State
Department. As Judicial Watch uncovered, the Clinton team immediately
violated this agreement
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26415&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAxNi8wOC8xMS91cy9wb2xpdGljcy9oaWxsYXJ5LWNsaW50b24tZW1haWxzLWNsaW50b24tZm91bmRhdGlvbi1naWxiZXJ0LWNoYWdvdXJ5Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
by
using the Clinton State Department to help Clinton Foundation donors.

The Clintons also agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26416&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hYmNuZXdzLmdvLmNvbS9Qb2xpdGljcy9iaWxsLWNsaW50b24tc291Z2h0LXN0YXRlLWRlcGFydG1lbnQtcGFpZC1zcGVlY2hlcy1yZWxhdGVkL3N0b3J5P2lkPTMzMzY5Mjc3JnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that
the State Department would approve Bill Clinton’s speeches. Judicial
Watch investigations (in partnership with the _Daily
Caller_) uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26417&F=T&]
that
this agreement translated into the Clinton State Department
rubber-stamping virtually all of Bill Clinton’s 215 speeches, which
raked in $48 million in speaking fees while his wife was secretary of
state. These speeches included government-controlled entities in
China, Russia and Saudi Arabia. State Department memos approving his
speeches were routinely sent to Cheryl Mills, who was Hillary
Clinton’s senior counsel and chief of staff – and a former
Foundation board member!

The former president blurred ethical lines, routinely mixing diplomacy
and Clinton Foundation fundraising. He praised
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26418&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BhZ2VzLWp3LXYtc3RhdGUtaHJjLWVtYWlscy0wMDY4Ny0yNi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
Colombian
President Manuel Santos’s efforts to reach out to terrorist group
FARC shortly after playing golf
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=7373&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMTYvMTAvMTUvY2xpbnRvbi1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLW1vcmUtY29uY2VybmVkLXdpdGgtYmlsbHMtcGFsLXRoYW4tY29sb21iaWFzLXBvb3IvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
with
the president as part of a fundraising effort. In another email
exchange, a Clinton Foundation official briefed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26419&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMTgvMDMvUGFnZXMtZnJvbS1KVy12LVN0YXRlLUhSQy1lbWFpbHMtMDA2ODctNTktNjAucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
the
State Department on Clinton’s trip to Myanmar and his efforts to
promote the Clinton Foundation.

If this wasn’t sleazy enough, emails reveal that the Clinton
Foundation was influencing State Department decisions. Records show
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26420&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmV3LWFiZWRpbi1lbWFpbHMtcmV2ZWFsLWhpbGxhcnktY2xpbnRvbi1zdGF0ZS1kZXBhcnRtZW50LWdhdmUtc3BlY2lhbC1hY2Nlc3MtdG9wLWNsaW50b24tZm91bmRhdGlvbi1kb25vcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that
Huma Abedin, Secretary Clinton’s close friend and State Department
official, often served as a conduit between Secretary Clinton and top
donors. In one case, Clinton declined to meet with Crown Prince Salman
of Bahrain, but after Doug Band from the Clinton Foundation emailed
Abedin, the Crown Prince ended up on Clinton’s schedule. Band also
attempted to get a visa for an English soccer player with a criminal
charge because Casey Wasserman, a major Foundation donor, wanted the
visa approved. Similarly, Band pushed Foggy Bottom to help Nigerian
billionaire Gilbert Chagoury, because Chagoury, who had donated
millions to the Clinton Foundation, was “key guy there [Lebanon] and
to us.”

In another instance, Band pushed Abedin to make a particular
hire, arguing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26421&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMTYvMDgvSlctdi1TdGF0ZS1BYmVkaW4tcHJvZHVjdGlvbi05LTAwNjg0LXBnLTIxMi0xLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
that
it was “important to take care of [Redacted].” Abedin assured Band
that “Personnel has been sending him options.” This revelation of
an outside donor pushing for a political appointment through a
nonprofit might seem shocking, but the Justice Department had little
interest in this influence peddling scheme.

Maybe the most egregious instance of Clinton corruption is
the Uranium One
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26422&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tLzIwMTYvMTAvaGlsbGFyeS1jbGludG9uLWNvcnJ1cHRpb24tZm91bmRhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
deal. Bill Clinton reportedly helped his billionaire pal Frank Giustra
acquire uranium mining rights from the Kazakhstani dictator in the
mid-2000s. Giustra then gave tens of millions to the Clinton
Foundation. In 2009, when it appeared the Kazakhstani government might
seize the uranium, Secretary Clinton helped approve a deal that
allowed a Russian state-owned company to take over part of the
company, even though she had previously opposed foreign companies
controlling vital U.S. resources. Unsurprisingly, those involved in
this deal donated millions to the Clinton Foundation, which tried to
hide
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=7005&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAxNS8wNC8yNC91cy9jYXNoLWZsb3dlZC10by1jbGludG9uLWZvdW5kYXRpb24tYXMtcnVzc2lhbnMtcHJlc3NlZC1mb3ItY29udHJvbC1vZi11cmFuaXVtLWNvbXBhbnkuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
the
donations.

The collapse of the Clinton Foundation might shock outsiders, but it
is no surprise to those who have watched the Clintons’ machinations
for years. The Foundation existed as a way for the Clintons to peddle
their connections and power in exchange for money. When it became
clear they’d never hold power again, donors predictably turned off
the cash spigot.

But the grift game never stops, as the Obama Foundation is now on the
scene. Amazon’s Jeff Bezos just gave the Obama Foundation a $100
million gift
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26423&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9Ub21GaXR0b24vc3RhdHVzLzE0NjI5MjU1Nzg2NjgwNjg4Njk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=].
As the
Clinton money machine declines, the Obama machine rises!

DOCUMENTS REVEAL BILL CLINTON’S TRIP WITH GHISLAINE MAXWELL

We have been investigating
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26372&F=T&]
former President Bill Clinton’s involvement with Jeffrey Epstein for
years, and we now have more insight.

We received four pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26371&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2JpbGwtY2xpbnRvbi1hbmQtZ2hpc2xhaW5lLW1heHdlbGwtb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
of records from the Secret Service revealing that Bill Clinton took a
trip with Ghislaine Maxwell to India. Maxwell, a longtime associate of
Jeffrey Epstein, is now on trial for sex trafficking and other
charges.

We obtained the documents through a FOIA request to the Secret Service
for information about any trips Bill Clinton took with Ghislaine
Maxwell.

The records include exchanges between Secret Service officers about a
trip Maxwell took with President Clinton. In a November 20, 2003,
email exchange, a Secret Service official advises a colleague, “The
LA lead is [redacted]. Manifest to Osaka and LA (has not been
confirmed but this should not deviate too much). FPOTUS Clinton
[redacted] Ghislaine Maxwell [redacted]. Crew [redacted].”

The colleague replied, “Thanks [redacted] info helps. I’ll have
the prelim sent to my office by this evening so the twx [teletype] can
go out tomorrow [redacted].”

On November 22, 2003, a Secret Service agent responded to the same
chain, writing, “[Redacted] I have just received an updated manifest
for the trip to LA. The additional names are [redacted]. Hope this
doesn’t create too many issues for you. I’ve attached the passport
list. Thanks [redacted]; Agra, India to Los Angeles, CA (via Japan for
fuel stop)”.

An official replies, “Thanks [redacted] I met with the [redacted]
today and they had given me that info along with [redacted] (another
addition), so we have 4 crew members and 12 staff and [redacted] USSS
[redacted] total. Not sure if they are feeding our [redacted] USSS, so
I’ll have food and drinks waiting for them. Cheers”.

Another agent responded, “as far as crew and usss are concerned then
that is correct – staff/guest list could change – as you see
[redacted] but I don’t think drastically. I just heard about
[redacted] from my saic [Special Agent-in-Charge]. If you are able to
get my guys food then it is greatly appreciated – evn [sic] an
attempt. All you guys in Honolulu have made my job much less
difficult. Thank you for all your help.”

Finally, an agent wrote “[Redacted] no problem. We’re here to help
and happy to do so. I know your guys have been run through the ringer
and I think everyone wants to see this trip get over, so if I can help
make their trip a little nicer, that’s the least we can do. I heard
that when they flew from Oslo to Hong Kong via Russia fuel stop, they
had nothing to eat that entire trip, so I don’t want that to happen
again.”

Obviously, this new information raises more questions about the extent
and nature of the relationship between Bill Clinton, Ghislaine Maxwell
and Jeffrey Epstein.

TRIAL UPDATE: JUDICIAL WATCH LAWYERS IN COURT TRIAL AGAINST
CALIFORNIA’S GENDER QUOTAS FOR CORPORATE BOARDS

Judicial Watch lawyers are now in a California Superior Court trial in
a taxpayer lawsuit challenging constitutionality of California’s
gender quotas for corporate boards of directors. The trial is expected
to last three weeks and is taking place in a Los Angeles courtroom
(_Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=14906&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LWV0LWFsLXYtcGFkaWxsYS13b21lbi1vbi1ib2FyZHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTI3NTYxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No.19STCV27561)).

We filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLW92ZXItZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLW1hbmRhdGUtZm9yLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1ib2FyZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
in Los Angeles County Superior Court in 2019, on behalf of California
taxpayers Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries. The lawsuit
challenges a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which requires every
publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least
one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its
board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law also requires
corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by
December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board.

We argue
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=25916&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1tc2otMjc1NjEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that California’s quotas for women on corporate boards violates the
Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution, among other
provisions, and we ask the court to permanently enjoin any expenditure
of taxpayer funds to implement the quotas.

In our brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26368&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS10cmlhbC1icmllZi0yNzU2MS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
prepared
for the trial we point out:

Even time spent by public officials carrying out an unlawful law can
be enjoined.... Application of the law as written will result in a
state official expending taxpayer funds on an unlawful law unless the
expenditures are enjoined.

***

California’s equal protection clause – is clear and well settled:
“When the challenged statutory scheme employs express gender
classifications, a plaintiff meets his or her burden [of establishing
unconstitutionality] by pointing that out.”

It is undeniable that SB 826 expressly employs a gender-based
classification. The law requires a pre-determined number of board
seats be set aside exclusively for women (or females as defined).
Accordingly, Plaintiffs will have satisfied the fourth and final
element of their article I, section 7 claim based on the statute
itself. The burden of justifying SB 826’s express gender
classification (i.e., satisfying all elements of strict scrutiny
analysis) shifts to Defendant ...
A new study
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26369&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2FsY29ycG9yYXRlbGF3LmNvbS9zdHVkeS1maW5kcy1hLXJvYnVzdC1hbmQtc2lnbmlmaWNhbnRseS1uZWdhdGl2ZS1zdG9jay1tYXJrZXQtcmVhY3Rpb24tdG8tY2FsaWZvcm5pYXMtZ2VuZGVyLXF1b3RhLW1hbmRhdGU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=],
published
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9wYXBlcnMuc3Nybi5jb20vc29sMy9wYXBlcnMuY2ZtP2Fic3RyYWN0X2lkPTMzMDM3OTgmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
on
November 18, found “a robust and significantly negative stock market
reaction” to California's gender quota mandate.

Before the quota bill passed, a California Assembly floor analysis
identified a “significant risk of legal challenges” to SB 826. It
characterized the legislation as creating a “quota-like system”
and noted, “[T]his bill, if enacted into law, would likely be
challenged on equal protection grounds ... The use of a quota-like
system, as proposed by this bill, to remedy past discrimination and
differences in opportunity may be difficult to defend.”

In signing SB 826 in September 2018, then-Governor Brown wrote that
“serious legal concerns have been raised” to the legislation. “I
don’t minimize the potential flaws that indeed may prove fatal to
its ultimate implementation.” He signed the bill anyway, noting
“Nevertheless, recent events in Washington, D.C. – and beyond –
make it crystal clear that many are not getting the message.”

This trial essentially puts ‘Critical Theory’ on the dock for a
discriminatory gender quota mandate that is blatantly unlawful and
unconstitutional. SB826 would upend decades of settled constitutional
law that prohibits discrimination based on sex. Even Gov. Brown, in
signing the law, worried that it is unconstitutional. We hope this
trial will vindicate the rule of law.

In a previous filing in this case, we included expert analysis
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=25917&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NyZXN0LXYtcGFkaWxsYS1tc2otMjc1NjEtcGdzLTc4LTEzNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
from
Jonathan Klick, Ph.D., J.D., an expert in econometrics, statistics,
and corporate law, who concluded:

In my opinion, the evidence offered in [the] declarations supporting
Secretary Padilla’s motion for each of these points
(underrepresentation of women on boards, discrimination as the cause
of this underrepresentation, and that research shows a differential
benefit of appointing women, as opposed to men, in terms of firm
performance) is deficient and unreliable.
In September 2020, we also filed a taxpayer lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=20716&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
to
prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979, which requires
the same corporation subject to the gender-based quota also to satisfy
racial, ethnic, sexual preference and transgender status quotas by the
end of the 2021 calendar year.

In January 2021, we filed a public comment
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=21653&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VjLmdvdi9jb21tZW50cy9zci1uYXNkYXEtMjAyMC0wODEvc3JuYXNkYXEyMDIwMDgxLTgxOTE0NDEtMjI3Mjc4LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
with
the Securities and Exchange Commission in response to a proposed rule
change requiring race and gender quotas on the boards of corporations
listed on the Nasdaq exchange.

Of course, we’ll be sure to let you know what the Los Angeles court
ultimately decides!

JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS TO DEPOSE CHICAGO MAYOR LORI LIGHTFOOT ABOUT HER
RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY

Your relentless Judicial Watch just filed a motion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26378&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdHRlbmFjY2ktdi1saWdodGZvb3QtbXRjLTAyODUyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
for
court authorization to depose Mayor Lori Lightfoot in our civil rights
lawsuit on behalf of Thomas Catenacci and the Daily Caller News
Foundation regarding her policy of only granting interviews to
“journalists of color.”

On May 18, 2021, Mayor Lightfoot’s office informed multiple
reporters that she would grant one-on-one interviews, “only to Black
or Brown journalists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=24997&F=T&
The next day, the mayor released a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=24998&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21heW9yLWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1qb3VybmFsaXN0cy0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
confirming
her discriminatory policy.

On May 27, 2021, we filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=25062&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbGlnaHRmb290X2NvbXBsYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
on
behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas
Catenacci against Lightfoot for violating their First Amendment Rights
and Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth
Amendment (_Catenacci et al. v. Lightfoot_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=24999&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No.
1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine,
Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit.

Catenacci, a white male, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting
a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The office never replied to the
request or to multiple follow up emails from Catenacci.

In August, the court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGlnaHRmb290LXJhY2lzdC1pbnRlcnZpZXctcG9saWN5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
the
deposition of a representative of Lightfoot’s office.

In our new motion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26378&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdHRlbmFjY2ktdi1saWdodGZvb3QtbXRjLTAyODUyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
we point out:

Defendant Lori Lightfoot breached her obligation ... to designate a
person or persons to testify on her behalf concerning topics
authorized by the Court. From the earliest moments of the deposition,
it was beyond clear that Mayor Lightfoot failed to produce a witness
who could testify to the factual issues raised in her motion to
dismiss and within the scope of the Court’s order. Specifically,
Kathleen LeFurgy, Mayor Lightfoot’s designee ... was grossly ill
prepared to testify as Mayor Lightfoot’s designee.
We are now asking the court to order the deposition of Lightfoot
herself “on oral examination ...”

In a separate motion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26380&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdHRlbmFjY2ktdi1saWdodGZvb3Qtb3Bwb3NlZC1tdGMtMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz],
we also ask the court to order the mayor’s office to answer 19
questions and any reasonable follow-up questions that LeFurgy had
refused to answer during the deposition.

Testimony in this lawsuit confirms Lightfoot is responsible for her
racist interview policy and is therefore a necessary witness in this
civil rights lawsuit.

“Based on the court proceedings to date it sure seems like Mayor
Lightfoot is trying to dodge responsibility for her racist interview
policy. We hope the court does not let this happen,” Daily Caller
News Foundation President Neil Patel said.

“It’s high time Mayor Lightfoot answered directly for denying my
interview request. The mayor must be held responsible for her
blatantly racist interview policy,” Thomas Catenacci said.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES ON BEHALF OF MASSACHUSETTS TEACHER FIRED FOR
OPPOSING CRITICAL RACE THEORY

Critical Race Theory abuse is rising schools across the country, and
we’re fighting back.

In our latest effort, we filed a federal civil rights lawsuit on
behalf of Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was
fired in retaliation for posts on social media objecting to the
inclusion of critical race theory in schools (_MacRae vs. Matthew
Mattos and Matthew A. Ferron_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26360&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21hY3JhZS12LW1hdHRvcy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMTE5MTcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
(No.
1:21-cv-11917).

The lawsuit, which was filed in the United States District Court for
the District of Massachusetts, asks for damages against Hanover School
Superintendent Matthew Ferron and Hanover High School Principal
Matthew Mattos for retaliating against MacRae, a math/business teacher
at Hanover High School, for exercising her First Amendment rights.

The lawsuit details that MacRae, who was hired as a Hanover High
School teacher on August 31, 2021, was fired over several TikTok video
posts that were made months prior to her hiring at the school. MacRae,
who in May of 2021 was elected to the Bourne School Committee, said
she made the posts in her personal capacity as a citizen and candidate
for public office.

MacRae was fired on September 29, 2021.

“I got fired specifically for a social media post I made,” she
said. “That’s a violation of free speech,” MacRae told the
_Cape Cod Times_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26361&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2FwZWNvZHRpbWVzLmNvbS9zdG9yeS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvMTAvMTMvY29udHJvdmVyc2lhbC1ib3VybmUtc2Nob29sLWJvYXJkLW1lbWJlci1maXJlZC10ZWFjaGluZy1qb2Ita2FyaS1tYWNyYWUvODQyMTc5NDAwMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in
an interview published on October 13, 2021.

The lawsuit details that Mattos met with MacRae on September 24, 2021
to inform her that he was investigating the impact of six memes and
two TikTok videos that MacRae posted which were referenced in a
September 22, 2021, _Boston Globe_ article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26362&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYm9zdG9uLmNvbS9uZXdzL2xvY2FsLW5ld3MvMjAyMS8wOS8yMi9ib3VybmUtdGVhY2hlcnMtc2Nob29sLWNvbW1pdHRlZS1yZXNpZ24tdGlrdG9rLXJhY2UtZ2VuZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==].

On May 18, 2021, as part of her campaign for school committee member,
MacRae posted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57305&L=26363&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYm9zdG9uZ2xvYmUuY29tLzIwMjEvMTAvMTQvbWV0cm8vYm91cm5lLXNjaG9vbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtbWVtYmVyLWZpcmVkLWhhbm92ZXItdGVhY2hpbmctam9iLW92ZXItc29jaWFsLW1lZGlhLXBvc3RzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
a
TikTok video which stated, in part:

So pretty much the reason I ran for school board and the reason I’m
taking on this responsibility is to ensure that students, at least in
our town, are not being taught critical race theory. That they’re
not being taught that the country was built on racism. So they’re
not being taught that they can choose whether or not they want to be a
girl or a boy. It’s one thing to include and it’s one thing to be
inclusive. And it’s one thing to educate everybody about everything.
It’s completely another thing to push your agenda. And, with me on
the school board, that won’t happen in our town.
In a letter dated September 29, 2021, Mattos fired MacRae from her
position at Hanover High School, stating, “I have determined that
continuing your employment in light of your social media posts would
have a significant impact on student learning at HHS.” Ferron
reviewed and approved Mattos’ decision to fire MacRae.

The lawsuit details that no Hanover High School parent or student had
raised concerns about MacRae’s employment at Hanover High School
because of the social media posts.

Kari MacRae was viciously targeted and unlawfully fired as a teacher
because she exercised her First Amendment rights to criticize critical
race theory. This civil rights lawsuit aims to hold accountable school
district officials who are so desperate to push critical race theory
that they will trample the civil rights of our client, Ms. MacRae.

Until next week ...

clean_body: NEW Federal Lawsuit on CRT Abuse! [INSIDE JW] THE SUPREME COURT SHOULD OVERTURN ROE V. WADE [==] The rule of law and our constitutional system was undermined by the Roe v. Wade decision that led to the legalization of abortion on demand. In this regard, Judicial Watch filed an amicus curiae [==] brief in the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. Wade. Our brief in support of the constitutionality of Mississippi’s Gestational Age Act argues that states have the right under the Constitution to regulate abortion and protect unborn life. (Dobbs v. Jackson [==] (No. 19-1392)). Our brief argues [] that the Supreme Court should overturn Roe and restore the regulation of abortion to the states: Despite creative judicial legislating, it is crystal clear that abortion does not involve war, peace, negotiation, foreign commerce, or taxation. Abortion fits squarely into the states’ sphere of objects that concern the “lives, liberties, and properties of the people.” Not being an enumerated power, the Roe Court did not have the authority to overturn the abortion laws of the states. Additionally, our brief notes [=] that Roe v. Wade didn’t provide clarity, but instead muddied the waters: Far from creating a national consensus, Roe threw the states into a 48-year contentious legal battle. Even some abortion advocates eschew the injudicious method of federalizing abortion as short-circuiting a naturally evolving jurisprudence under state laws. As federal and state judges attempt to apply this Court’s precedents, a national landscape of inconsistent, inconclusive, and untenable rules have emerged. As a national policy, abortion jurisprudence is, in a word, a mess. Stubbornly holding on to unconstitutional precedent will never have a positive outcome. It is time to return abortion policy to the states where it belongs and where the democratic process can effectively work. States must be able to defend life, and the disastrous Roe decision has upended our constitutional order. The Supreme Court has a chance to right a constitutional wrong in a way that will allow Americans again to protect the right to life. The Supreme Court is expected to rule by June of next year... WHY NO ONE IS SURPRISED HILLARY CLINTON’S INFLUENCE-PEDDLING FOUNDATION COLLAPSED Per usual, Judicial Watch took the lead in exposing Bill and Hillary Clinton’s shady dealings inside their “foundation,” especially in the way they used it to sell influence. Now their foundation’s fundraising is collapsing, which isn’t a surprise, as I detail in this op-ed [=] for Daily Caller: When one of the most recognizable nonprofits in the world loses 75% of its contributions over a four-year period, there are typically investigatory reports written into what has gone wrong. That isn’t the case with the Clinton Foundation. The Foundation received [==] $62.9 million in 2016 but only $16.3 million in 2020, and very few people seem to have noticed. That is because most Beltway insiders know the Clinton Foundation’s primary purpose: to serve as a platform for Hillary Clinton’s political operation while lining the Clintons’ pockets by trading influence for money. That is why donations spiked [] when Hillary was secretary of state and most of the world thought she was destined to become president — and why they cratered after she lost. Kevin Thurm, the CEO of the Clinton Foundation, tried to play off the 2020 decline off as pandemic-related. In a letter, he wrote [] that 2020 “was a difficult year for philanthropy. Across the sector, resources were stretched thinly and fundraising activities were impacted.” This argument doesn’t explain the tens of millions the Foundation lost between 2016 and 2019 and ignores that charitable giving was up by 5.1% [==] in America last year. Of course, an objective observer easily understands the real reason the Clinton Foundation experienced such a sharp decline in contributions since 2016. The Foundation is an influence-peddling scheme, and the Clintons’ influence has waned. Even Obama understood the scheme. When President Obama nominated Hillary Clinton in 2009 to serve as secretary of state, she agreed to a strict memorandum of understanding [=] to wall off the Foundation from conflicts of interest with the State Department. As Judicial Watch uncovered, the Clinton team immediately violated this agreement [=] by using the Clinton State Department to help Clinton Foundation donors. The Clintons also agreed [] that the State Department would approve Bill Clinton’s speeches. Judicial Watch investigations (in partnership with the Daily Caller) uncovered [] that this agreement translated into the Clinton State Department rubber-stamping virtually all of Bill Clinton’s 215 speeches, which raked in $48 million in speaking fees while his wife was secretary of state. These speeches included government-controlled entities in China, Russia and Saudi Arabia. State Department memos approving his speeches were routinely sent to Cheryl Mills, who was Hillary Clinton’s senior counsel and chief of staff – and a former Foundation board member! The former president blurred ethical lines, routinely mixing diplomacy and Clinton Foundation fundraising. He praised [=] Colombian President Manuel Santos’s efforts to reach out to terrorist group FARC shortly after playing golf [] with the president as part of a fundraising effort. In another email exchange, a Clinton Foundation official briefed [] the State Department on Clinton’s trip to Myanmar and his efforts to promote the Clinton Foundation. If this wasn’t sleazy enough, emails reveal that the Clinton Foundation was influencing State Department decisions. Records show [] that Huma Abedin, Secretary Clinton’s close friend and State Department official, often served as a conduit between Secretary Clinton and top donors. In one case, Clinton declined to meet with Crown Prince Salman of Bahrain, but after Doug Band from the Clinton Foundation emailed Abedin, the Crown Prince ended up on Clinton’s schedule. Band also attempted to get a visa for an English soccer player with a criminal charge because Casey Wasserman, a major Foundation donor, wanted the visa approved. Similarly, Band pushed Foggy Bottom to help Nigerian billionaire Gilbert Chagoury, because Chagoury, who had donated millions to the Clinton Foundation, was “key guy there [Lebanon] and to us.” In another instance, Band pushed Abedin to make a particular hire, arguing [==] that it was “important to take care of [Redacted].” Abedin assured Band that “Personnel has been sending him options.” This revelation of an outside donor pushing for a political appointment through a nonprofit might seem shocking, but the Justice Department had little interest in this influence peddling scheme. Maybe the most egregious instance of Clinton corruption is the Uranium One [=] deal. Bill Clinton reportedly helped his billionaire pal Frank Giustra acquire uranium mining rights from the Kazakhstani dictator in the mid-2000s. Giustra then gave tens of millions to the Clinton Foundation. In 2009, when it appeared the Kazakhstani government might seize the uranium, Secretary Clinton helped approve a deal that allowed a Russian state-owned company to take over part of the company, even though she had previously opposed foreign companies controlling vital U.S. resources. Unsurprisingly, those involved in this deal donated millions to the Clinton Foundation, which tried to hide [==] the donations. The collapse of the Clinton Foundation might shock outsiders, but it is no surprise to those who have watched the Clintons’ machinations for years. The Foundation existed as a way for the Clintons to peddle their connections and power in exchange for money. When it became clear they’d never hold power again, donors predictably turned off the cash spigot. But the grift game never stops, as the Obama Foundation is now on the scene. Amazon’s Jeff Bezos just gave the Obama Foundation a $100 million gift [=]. As the Clinton money machine declines, the Obama machine rises! DOCUMENTS REVEAL BILL CLINTON’S TRIP WITH GHISLAINE MAXWELL We have been investigating [=] former President Bill Clinton’s involvement with Jeffrey Epstein for years, and we now have more insight. We received four pages [==] of records from the Secret Service revealing that Bill Clinton took a trip with Ghislaine Maxwell to India. Maxwell, a longtime associate of Jeffrey Epstein, is now on trial for sex trafficking and other charges. We obtained the documents through a FOIA request to the Secret Service for information about any trips Bill Clinton took with Ghislaine Maxwell. The records include exchanges between Secret Service officers about a trip Maxwell took with President Clinton. In a November 20, 2003, email exchange, a Secret Service official advises a colleague, “The LA lead is [redacted]. Manifest to Osaka and LA (has not been confirmed but this should not deviate too much). FPOTUS Clinton [redacted] Ghislaine Maxwell [redacted]. Crew [redacted].” The colleague replied, “Thanks [redacted] info helps. I’ll have the prelim sent to my office by this evening so the twx [teletype] can go out tomorrow [redacted].” On November 22, 2003, a Secret Service agent responded to the same chain, writing, “[Redacted] I have just received an updated manifest for the trip to LA. The additional names are [redacted]. Hope this doesn’t create too many issues for you. I’ve attached the passport list. Thanks [redacted]; Agra, India to Los Angeles, CA (via Japan for fuel stop)”. An official replies, “Thanks [redacted] I met with the [redacted] today and they had given me that info along with [redacted] (another addition), so we have 4 crew members and 12 staff and [redacted] USSS [redacted] total. Not sure if they are feeding our [redacted] USSS, so I’ll have food and drinks waiting for them. Cheers”. Another agent responded, “as far as crew and usss are concerned then that is correct – staff/guest list could change – as you see [redacted] but I don’t think drastically. I just heard about [redacted] from my saic [Special Agent-in-Charge]. If you are able to get my guys food then it is greatly appreciated – evn [sic] an attempt. All you guys in Honolulu have made my job much less difficult. Thank you for all your help.” Finally, an agent wrote “[Redacted] no problem. We’re here to help and happy to do so. I know your guys have been run through the ringer and I think everyone wants to see this trip get over, so if I can help make their trip a little nicer, that’s the least we can do. I heard that when they flew from Oslo to Hong Kong via Russia fuel stop, they had nothing to eat that entire trip, so I don’t want that to happen again.” Obviously, this new information raises more questions about the extent and nature of the relationship between Bill Clinton, Ghislaine Maxwell and Jeffrey Epstein. TRIAL UPDATE: JUDICIAL WATCH LAWYERS IN COURT TRIAL AGAINST CALIFORNIA’S GENDER QUOTAS FOR CORPORATE BOARDS Judicial Watch lawyers are now in a California Superior Court trial in a taxpayer lawsuit challenging constitutionality of California’s gender quotas for corporate boards of directors. The trial is expected to last three weeks and is taking place in a Los Angeles courtroom (Robin Crest et al. v. Alex Padilla [==] (No.19STCV27561)). We filed the lawsuit [] in Los Angeles County Superior Court in 2019, on behalf of California taxpayers Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries. The lawsuit challenges a 2018 law, known as Senate Bill 826, which requires every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director “who self-identifies her gender as a woman” on its board of directors by December 31, 2019. The law also requires corporations to have up to three such persons on their boards by December 31, 2021, depending on the size of the board. We argue [] that California’s quotas for women on corporate boards violates the Equal Protection Clause of the California Constitution, among other provisions, and we ask the court to permanently enjoin any expenditure of taxpayer funds to implement the quotas. In our brief [=] prepared for the trial we point out: Even time spent by public officials carrying out an unlawful law can be enjoined.... Application of the law as written will result in a state official expending taxpayer funds on an unlawful law unless the expenditures are enjoined. California’s equal protection clause – is clear and well settled: “When the challenged statutory scheme employs express gender classifications, a plaintiff meets his or her burden [of establishing unconstitutionality] by pointing that out.” It is undeniable that SB 826 expressly employs a gender-based classification. The law requires a pre-determined number of board seats be set aside exclusively for women (or females as defined). Accordingly, Plaintiffs will have satisfied the fourth and final element of their article I, section 7 claim based on the statute itself. The burden of justifying SB 826’s express gender classification (i.e., satisfying all elements of strict scrutiny analysis) shifts to Defendant ... A new study [=], published [=] on November 18, found “a robust and significantly negative stock market reaction” to California's gender quota mandate. Before the quota bill passed, a California Assembly floor analysis identified a “significant risk of legal challenges” to SB 826. It characterized the legislation as creating a “quota-like system” and noted, “[T]his bill, if enacted into law, would likely be challenged on equal protection grounds ... The use of a quota-like system, as proposed by this bill, to remedy past discrimination and differences in opportunity may be difficult to defend.” In signing SB 826 in September 2018, then-Governor Brown wrote that “serious legal concerns have been raised” to the legislation. “I don’t minimize the potential flaws that indeed may prove fatal to its ultimate implementation.” He signed the bill anyway, noting “Nevertheless, recent events in Washington, D.C. – and beyond – make it crystal clear that many are not getting the message.” This trial essentially puts ‘Critical Theory’ on the dock for a discriminatory gender quota mandate that is blatantly unlawful and unconstitutional. SB826 would upend decades of settled constitutional law that prohibits discrimination based on sex. Even Gov. Brown, in signing the law, worried that it is unconstitutional. We hope this trial will vindicate the rule of law. In a previous filing in this case, we included expert analysis [=] from Jonathan Klick, Ph.D., J.D., an expert in econometrics, statistics, and corporate law, who concluded: In my opinion, the evidence offered in [the] declarations supporting Secretary Padilla’s motion for each of these points (underrepresentation of women on boards, discrimination as the cause of this underrepresentation, and that research shows a differential benefit of appointing women, as opposed to men, in terms of firm performance) is deficient and unreliable. In September 2020, we also filed a taxpayer lawsuit [=] to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979, which requires the same corporation subject to the gender-based quota also to satisfy racial, ethnic, sexual preference and transgender status quotas by the end of the 2021 calendar year. In January 2021, we filed a public comment [==] with the Securities and Exchange Commission in response to a proposed rule change requiring race and gender quotas on the boards of corporations listed on the Nasdaq exchange. Of course, we’ll be sure to let you know what the Los Angeles court ultimately decides! JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS TO DEPOSE CHICAGO MAYOR LORI LIGHTFOOT ABOUT HER RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY Your relentless Judicial Watch just filed a motion [==] for court authorization to depose Mayor Lori Lightfoot in our civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Thomas Catenacci and the Daily Caller News Foundation regarding her policy of only granting interviews to “journalists of color.” On May 18, 2021, Mayor Lightfoot’s office informed multiple reporters that she would grant one-on-one interviews, “only to Black or Brown journalists [= The next day, the mayor released a letter [==] confirming her discriminatory policy. On May 27, 2021, we filed the lawsuit [=] on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Lightfoot for violating their First Amendment Rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment (Catenacci et al. v. Lightfoot [] (No. 1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine, Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit. Catenacci, a white male, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The office never replied to the request or to multiple follow up emails from Catenacci. In August, the court ordered [==] the deposition of a representative of Lightfoot’s office. In our new motion [==], we point out: Defendant Lori Lightfoot breached her obligation ... to designate a person or persons to testify on her behalf concerning topics authorized by the Court. From the earliest moments of the deposition, it was beyond clear that Mayor Lightfoot failed to produce a witness who could testify to the factual issues raised in her motion to dismiss and within the scope of the Court’s order. Specifically, Kathleen LeFurgy, Mayor Lightfoot’s designee ... was grossly ill prepared to testify as Mayor Lightfoot’s designee. We are now asking the court to order the deposition of Lightfoot herself “on oral examination ...” In a separate motion [], we also ask the court to order the mayor’s office to answer 19 questions and any reasonable follow-up questions that LeFurgy had refused to answer during the deposition. Testimony in this lawsuit confirms Lightfoot is responsible for her racist interview policy and is therefore a necessary witness in this civil rights lawsuit. “Based on the court proceedings to date it sure seems like Mayor Lightfoot is trying to dodge responsibility for her racist interview policy. We hope the court does not let this happen,” Daily Caller News Foundation President Neil Patel said. “It’s high time Mayor Lightfoot answered directly for denying my interview request. The mayor must be held responsible for her blatantly racist interview policy,” Thomas Catenacci said. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES ON BEHALF OF MASSACHUSETTS TEACHER FIRED FOR OPPOSING CRITICAL RACE THEORY Critical Race Theory abuse is rising schools across the country, and we’re fighting back. In our latest effort, we filed a federal civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media objecting to the inclusion of critical race theory in schools (MacRae vs. Matthew Mattos and Matthew A. Ferron [] (No. 1:21-cv-11917). The lawsuit, which was filed in the United States District Court for the District of Massachusetts, asks for damages against Hanover School Superintendent Matthew Ferron and Hanover High School Principal Matthew Mattos for retaliating against MacRae, a math/business teacher at Hanover High School, for exercising her First Amendment rights. The lawsuit details that MacRae, who was hired as a Hanover High School teacher on August 31, 2021, was fired over several TikTok video posts that were made months prior to her hiring at the school. MacRae, who in May of 2021 was elected to the Bourne School Committee, said she made the posts in her personal capacity as a citizen and candidate for public office. MacRae was fired on September 29, 2021. “I got fired specifically for a social media post I made,” she said. “That’s a violation of free speech,” MacRae told the Cape Cod Times [=] in an interview published on October 13, 2021. The lawsuit details that Mattos met with MacRae on September 24, 2021 to inform her that he was investigating the impact of six memes and two TikTok videos that MacRae posted which were referenced in a September 22, 2021, Boston Globe article [==]. On May 18, 2021, as part of her campaign for school committee member, MacRae posted [==] a TikTok video which stated, in part: So pretty much the reason I ran for school board and the reason I’m taking on this responsibility is to ensure that students, at least in our town, are not being taught critical race theory. That they’re not being taught that the country was built on racism. So they’re not being taught that they can choose whether or not they want to be a girl or a boy. It’s one thing to include and it’s one thing to be inclusive. And it’s one thing to educate everybody about everything. It’s completely another thing to push your agenda. And, with me on the school board, that won’t happen in our town. In a letter dated September 29, 2021, Mattos fired MacRae from her position at Hanover High School, stating, “I have determined that continuing your employment in light of your social media posts would have a significant impact on student learning at HHS.” Ferron reviewed and approved Mattos’ decision to fire MacRae. The lawsuit details that no Hanover High School parent or student had raised concerns about MacRae’s employment at Hanover High School because of the social media posts. Kari MacRae was viciously targeted and unlawfully fired as a teacher because she exercised her First Amendment rights to criticize critical race theory. This civil rights lawsuit aims to hold accountable school district officials who are so desperate to push critical race theory that they will trample the civil rights of our client, Ms. MacRae. Until next week ... Fellow American - Today is a huge Saturday in Georgia.

## #1 Georgia vs. #3 Alabama
I know what it's like to play in a big game. I was proud to help my fellow Dawgs win a national championship in 1980! And Georgia has ended Alabama's 92-game streak as a favorite to win this year.

There's nothing like the roar of the crowd and the support of fans to lead to a good fight on the field, and Team Herschel is hoping for a big Bulldog win this afternoon.

clean_body: Today is Championship Saturday for Georgia Football! My Dawgs are in the SEC Championship! Today is Championship Saturday for Georgia Football! My Dawgs are in the SEC Championship! | Fellow American - Today is a huge Saturday in Georgia. #1 Georgia vs. #3 Alabama I know what it's like to play in a big game. I was proud to help my fellow Dawgs win a national championship in 1980! And Georgia has ended Alabama's 92-game streak as a favorite to win this year. There's nothing like the roar of the crowd and the support of fans to lead to a good fight on the field, and Team Herschel is hoping for a big Bulldog win this afternoon. Just like UGA, our campaign is bringing our "A-game" over the next year to win back this seat and flip the Senate. We have a massive tailgate planned at today's game - including an appearance of our new Herschel Express bus! Let's Go Dawgs!! Herschel Walker P.S. I might have left the playing field for the political arena, but Team Herschel still needs your help! Thanks for being on OUR team! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Ou Peter, The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Our friends and neighbors around the state are fired up about bringing REAL change to New Mexico by firing Governor Lujan Grisham. New Mexicans need _practical_ relief from out-of-control taxes, inflation, and a devastating border crisis. We need **true** leadership in these divisive times. **[But with all of this excitement, there’s still one thing missing... ](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=7a20e459fa714afa950023892b02dd67&_e=o26p4-QUQvgaq5jYIj28CADIVdgRqSObY3cQW7F3DyYXZUeyPgufIELeRonADqP9OU5AkF7TEDBh4soAMDngaz6leXo-J3QtteRU06zoGL5EnS-z04ZM-XCS74JYzq0VoOXrRSW1apb0mh5eNyaHEh-z2G15_lm3jZY53j9rguRA5ff-jFbCWWDa1_XJM-tGiJdY7aoOfxvPXP1HWkWprW9776CGfTQUqb4AzLVWzb5T1ot5Jbz2TbdGrXk8r1BVaQ_pHYC-S8R9d_g-si_n9pyzMafXyikOuadCT-AKCklQ1Ur-5D1a_gCApBV8nPsyxw_xCbC-VFzNVFcPpKrgP0X969tjQZa3a36E5a9bdRXjzD7th3wtH-U1J7tXhmOooT-Npkbuep7lSVK1plHqcrMkSG6R1ROFq4Tix5R3mZgkooU_f5t3h8UJcDQtv31Jp2Ro4EGn-UELWOvWjVrkO_KrVMaT3f_PdoncNasZi4aDg6s7Cp6Qbjp79-HtKvBI0cA3hLGYjDFOtPBPwYn6Fszo7aQiMCAlKap0L8ablUg%3D)** Peter, because I know you’re a strong conservative I wanted to personally invite you to a special group of supporters that I’m calling our **Founding Members.** The Founding Members status is designated _only_ to those who I know I can count on and depend on when this race gets tough... clean_body: The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Ou Peter, The momentum surrounding the gubernatorial race here in New Mexico has far surpassed anything Krysty, the girls, and I were ever able to imagine. Our friends and neighbors around the state are fired up about bringing REAL change to New Mexico by firing Governor Lujan Grisham. New Mexicans need practical relief from out-of-control taxes, inflation, and a devastating border crisis. We need true leadership in these divisive times. Peter, because I know you’re a strong conservative I wanted to personally invite you to a special group of supporters that I’m calling our Founding Members. The Founding Members status is designated only to those who I know I can count on and depend on when this race gets tough... It’s also for those who I know are committed to seeing New Mexico elect a conservative Governor to turn our state around. But here’s the catch, Peter: There are only 150 open slots to join the Founding Members team and I would encourage you that if you want to join, now is the time to do so... BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER Email: Founding Member Status: MISSING Once you officially join the team, I’ll be relying on hearing from you directly about what’s happening on the ground, I’ll be reaching out to share exclusive updates, and more... and I’m confident we will be able to win this race with your continued help and support. Mark Ronchetti, Candidate for New Mexico Governor | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. name: James Tarantin
subject: Hanukkah
