body:
Peter, we have to protect our traditional values. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyv7OAWZxyNfQVNMAcdtMXPVCFRQHrU0I4tiS_mLfzBNPIVKrh9Cxy5TE4lNav3D0u23g4JX7JsZbUF13XUIzVDiRo_Haa4MrYY8Lg4BA_ZFy01AlvtNOJJFCgrfhN_IUL2rghj_CsIZcRf21Jvlx-h08ZuMYLc7r0VMb8-Gk3W51sW7-C-HnFUnlyQR_olY_xHT8tbmFPB3ojUKa2sVMJUqSGmT-SgaK8hlbZcRmD0HaI)

It’s Hanukkah Peter,

_**To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government.**_ It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate****, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, are you with me Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyvxrqGM017Nn36hsVKicVm51J9qxHwwMXW7b0EM8m046_TfKlC80dYdfGwS5Nl6VLjEQgdEyBkJOODsEuYrjgQqDpjlck2k-Z727tdBGKG00LJU4oU5gQZdL7Kk9puzVwAOtZ2QwvTJDqPpkLk2xjTQ3J5Etonm4jmlr5hi6FHl4mwUJX1ATym3bBspRULvUzAR_07EQ8gouuLBYqM7Bctmq2x49OUwLrz7fB2n8mKmGI)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyv_pom5jmV7Dq2DpkHP7uOiw35brX4ABB6zrveY4JXDHGpnKwPU3oWmzoV1YKuSHQGoptU7t29LTyaL7U_ROhVHWM7LEcP2gGQtyzBud95DNQWssZn2SEZ87fCSWXQCnHY_Qo9T1SxwfnX4ZGoddtxlNmYsdaRQIHzYsRdyTeitvQNtICeU6yNF3oT6DSHwOr-auyW9MUhX7UylRj-R_d9i4C024bSl-a7Lq-y4Q9asqo)
**Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists.

**Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. **I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either.**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyvxdiqEtEQ49CTvF4eXEx6Ml02ly-TYx6c6-PMLrDUsDXK4AEA37zuoTz4hDeLBPmrOkWqihZfAOFXEjcmNVY5_UXE-lsLDbnKnDqr9pLco-DZaclbZeUjZ0bwwSLlgMcOfO7zChwExH1MMGRt1Btoh70UBHGcTqIYnhuZtZA5KzUuLsBNMlJHBiBGH5BGD0dCoioy-IMGpBEiSgUuXcbpJC0B9yleL76hZAAaGCAf0Vn)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**Help me be the reason we win back the Senate by supporting my campaign to become the next Republican Senator from Maryland. If we can do that, then we can finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyv-lVf1wSgbrpy2HBq40vBYJ_sr2Af_DOG_g7WtmweacTPQTdMuPbG9s0eXF9uyAd2iLuRk8nZ66WqiclXGKcJesN2uQNVXDHVHuHHJLLNkL70GLMkl5FDg94-7HTD5wmzkDXifkZxoeCImeDEE0E2mnoDACs8guQbHq_qJQrOEvYexksCX1Qu6ZzsvpFthXq0juwolUCWmnDGxTy_-jvCQw-q6cJrFeMFbFeogs734xk)

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyvznxvVCloDhrFm5Vv5CT1qnB7SQZAaOgQR0Hl1QMZ3Vd0d1FeAC_cA3mbk4MhwGUKvtAk0-FWF4md3bV2T9j_1MVtEHkEZMSdL60zcKilpTU0B2P76Gx0PpsaIwNj2Ilz0q6qaGmRw2pe4kjZkcrleDSFspJFY8oSvq-l_H4wSjXgpKyXehvEXa45qhVRJ6svsRgStqI8GuYBT0qm2A_TiTBQrZoP7MjDg_KX06j7UI7)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4fe1682c7f664f71ade624a9a2d86018&_e=p1SHMcCVZXwAfOWDTx8IM8lRw_XQHLj0VwS9N6XFSeKZWI5qqwxUIHVPqUsHOihNKb-u01bmnvErWtu1rpuiMJmBEfLUDRKTcN4gob3XwJ-visMTgy9KXqdaBqIIShjAU0igCNLytHXvHL0BhHLvg4QjBcpyYpLM0NMFhhHts7YI69pd8gRjxR1B3nqs0POGrqp0rBdQws6MPBOiZbbU74oCY2dDnzfMkkRcKL5N71rHyCZs7bhqjboK2hU-Uc1pVAaXmUGEkmyPdwCNSeWyvwPC1YzAfHSxP0QZutVox8ghvUYqE8-qayLyVN5R1CRqO24y8Fnoiwv-ERtpGtAShzDlkHMtJCw4t74xuQaZT698puWcVjXruGtKC5V_RfUrdPL0aOSOnClvrs19GlroZ5RGiIIP0N7SzEvjTURG7-Jwvz4p6OFkTvLEqx1kSrmFfBKC3QKmigdMHMUf-dqm89tCQAyxWPABmFZP9obhXdjiV6DAQF-MlZWU6buJ6iMV)

body:
Fellow American, we have to protect our traditional values. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f1zqUJ-epXbJ6Gl91-XGEP0myzy1v1gUfu84zozEaJHOgpPow5igSQEYx6MIjJEb2qEF6BQ7DZFGeUWhGqkX6Vh22kTgO59jOVRgFHCx02rftZUhysfLCN11sAkpHgPywO1dUAXGsPjNdYEAScflNGa6dns3Nfq8m69gTnLjF3fyiqY6OnmpZGwSQouvSfYLvWiXpZvIjjRyh2CNz9_5Zb9o%3D)

It’s Hanukkah Fellow American,

_**To me and many others, Hanukkah represents a divine miracle that shows God comes before government.**_ It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, and in America, that means our Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics and made me who I am. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate****, and I’m running because much like Hanukkah, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. [**We have to stand up for the values that made this nation great to begin with, are you with me Fellow American?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f15cayqrU_i139HBXwaO9vlbnK_JSLRuWy9bplCEgwzOyhYyK5964jiVEAltC1OPrteuzsICThLk37u4j6yHFn6nlgARlSOOqU3AnH74gr5YWazYZu9QI0tsB_-S60dD4RBPP5lCTliPUx1mW9rSrzQayxVoor1Z5JtqSBEqAht7KywUSD9bwduCLxQpupjZCu8XlVD7P5AY0tP6I4V-mel0%3D)

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f1zwpcaNyumkzN9nXWcHEKbZkHEqqER5QeR1Gkl81yuwDi8jAAtrMRWAKgSUXSuEarX6G9AwDsyhhG0lZb9OoqEzQ1lMySSowFVacTGY78skXK8QXMYyD0asLzE2ailKLdak2djKLPHqyR6f_tYycE9j2nrP956Wz4KOBAXk9XQNK7Xn9yJJ1jx0qMecRkWfQncsPdVXSruwLqxF5Wo6Z5XQ%3D)
**Regardless of whether you celebrate Hanukkah or not, the values of this holiday are the same ones that made America great.** The radical liberals we’re dealing with today would never admit that. Hanukkah to them is a political talking point for social media, while quietly pushing anti-Israel policies and extending their hands to terrorists.

**Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan, and now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with their leadership which is full of internationally wanted terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with. **I would never support that, and I don’t think you could either.**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f16LIuLKTL-S0BEd_IqLBjBcIvIdpMgeQbvscNhCH-IvlHLiUQtzmf5FrQ3KJEyhr1ryggqW7Hb0u0P0REPsZ57rwfB88Pm1SI5WiWSxLyE46WEjGn0LBWAt5MYGv8rYZ_9c5X_QGgduLbXlUI8VEwac4umEeWtefPyvCPKiNmOQXzbk3wC0MwHj2jMjEa2B31zW87j_VvTIXYZ5i0QCsBcs%3D)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking, and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

[**Help me be the reason we win back the Senate by supporting my campaign to become the next Republican Senator from Maryland. If we can do that, then we can finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f1xqvzLxDCoEfPSy1YWReHra_bHEW57_lX21fugiizaQZbp3FFO8gVmmXybxzIgUZGsitcChuUMBAcnWfYqZeUl-t7lOgE8mYXqQbecfYMSbrR-lksSFih09cGEVoQ8-DhPwg6MpItGqW1ohZcqN5-vRnUSRNbnelmO4cmGumxw-Am1DfAh0ViE7KJxa0J4g_S0yA5IvIvOrbkbVe3-1_y4E%3D)

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f1ypy985VHYAb53_nxlC5hG3Q4ctjrkmmgy3nam0xs1HT_1WcwqYMtbf54Gg66qJknYaby2b9vrXx8VnvNA5UZ3C_-qopE8pcUFjblwnwZ8t7t8sb9P4ccWMqc-vD523VgZbvh5wOxoOrmiNH1ACEdgG3lDChna6mpHHAgfFUrVo8at1phHQhySytQ1rNqyxJvIFtDOIcXKHtVvqTOxi0k8s%3D)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

[** STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9da1cfabd4de4d129fc6685d46c45327&_e=08jFt9rR0AIJ-lhd-d0JAp6FEssd4jJDiRs85ZNwqEqS8R6-1T-aMT03m6pkUp_4cu_5AaHBfnIY9jVeCtIoB7MWWMdsvoFjVCpruL2M-Pn9lCKhmfm8nCOW6yH-MkBJ4SUrDP9yxQHm3RhMbeGeAaj3ffWCd6wg71_IFubbc1KDYFsHdTVU6a48hivxbciAb23lFwRzaXRUh-v5Dr6OC-x9Te_6KxY2pJugRwyBKUI1ILXXjj6hmMZndM79ZxkB9Po8tr9yXTB77qi4-s3f1zzGG3xMUj7XmPCyGPb0nGVsx1013WeTz3GE_QGdKMbT4SkhX5hmczT-vsD0oArMidBX-nyg_KlsF7LVKiEHn-r9DfgAVYfZ6Sm48dIkckDcYdFVyPUC-GHE4xutcLIq30W1VfCs3-PfTxOpBVSULrAxBAF5d86XakGHKI20jx3trYLe3WCX8P2vxWwjNBeO4LtvKgNsVMIP8bM-sOAzAUw%3D)
